NC","title":"760 NC","description":"\nBrand\tJBL\nModel Name\tTune\nColour\tBlack\nForm Factor\tOver Ear\nConnectivity Technology\t\nBluetooth 5.0\n\nAbout this item\nACTIVE NOISE CANCELLATION: Tune out the Noise & Tune in to your Music with JBL Tune 760NC wireless headset.\nJBL PURE BASS SOUND: For over 70 years, JBL has engineered the precise, impressive sound found in big venues around the world. These Bluetooth headphones reproduce that same JBL sound, punching out bass that’s both deep and powerful.\nUP TO 50 HOURS PLAYTIME: Listen wirelessly for up to 35 hours with Active Noise Cancellation or up to 50 hours without Noise Cancellation for long-lasting fun. Recharge the battery quickly in 2 hours or enjoy endlessly in wired mode using the detachable AUX cable provided.\nGOOGLE FAST PAIR: Thanks to Fast Pair enabled by Google, the JBL Tune 760NC are immediately connected to your Android device. You can also pair multiple devices just by tapping on the devices’ screen.\nDUAL PAIRING (MULTI-POINT CONNECTION): Allows you to effortlessly switch from one Bluetooth device to another. You can simply switch from a video on your tablet to a call on your mobile phone so that you’ll never miss a call.\n\n","rating":3.0,"price":6000.0,"offer":20.0,"type":"headphones","brand":"jbl","category":"electronics","merchantId":1248,"quantity":10,"status":"ACTIVE","thumbnailURL":"https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/31K0TGXVovL._SX300_SY300_QL70_FMwebp_.jpg","productImageURLs":["https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/51UFCmurtZL._SX522_.jpg","https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/619AhAz3GCL._SX522_.jpg","https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/61pXNw6JpLL._SX522_.jpg"],"searchTags":["Wireless","Headphones","JBL"],"reviews":[{"reviewId":12887,"shopperId":153868,"shopperName":"usha gowda","heading":"good","description":"sound clarity will  be good","rating":4.0,"dateTime":"2024-10-22T14:56:59.59"},{"reviewId":21908,"shopperId":285849,"shopperName":"shashi kumar","heading":"Very good","description":"Good","rating":5.0,"dateTime":"2025-08-16T12:30:31.953"},{"reviewId":27464,"shopperId":364202,"shopperName":"Akash Awati","heading":"Headphone ","description":"Quality is good","rating":3.0,"dateTime":"2026-03-10T16:01:06.008"},{"reviewId":27769,"shopperId":368509,"shopperName":"Siddu K R","heading":"Headphone","description":"super","rating":5.0,"dateTime":"2026-03-12T16:13:40.762"}],"createdDateTime":"2023-09-13T12:48:22.31","zoneId":"ALPHA"},{"productId":79,"name":"Oneplus buds pro2","title":"Oneplus buds","description":"Brand\tOnePlus\nModel Name\tBuds Pro\nColour\tArbor Green\nForm Factor\tIn Ear\nConnectivity Technology\tWireless, Bluetooth\nAbout this item\nSeamless connectivity: Instantaneous pairing with OnePlus smartphone, as soon as you open the charging case lid. It also has Google Fast Pair that helps to connect any android phones easily. To use earbuds functions, please upgrade the Wireless Earphones APP or OnePlus Buds APP to the latest version from Google Play.\nSpatial audio: Enjoy Spatial Audio with Dynamic Head Tracking feature that helps you experience sounds on a whole new level. Co-created with Dynaudio: Helps you achieve optimal listening experience. Smart Scene Noise Cancellation2.0 : Up to 48dB Ultra-wide frequency noise cancellation system with personalized ANC\nWorry-free Battery Life: Up-to 40 Hours Battery with quick charging 10 minutes for 3 hours of use with ANC on. Full charged earbud: up to 6h(music playback; ANC ON); up to 9h(music playback; ANC Off). OnePlus Audio ID2.0 : Personalize your audio via simple listening test at first time setup. This unique hearing profile ID allows one to enjoy the most optimal listening experience best suited to him or her by compensating for mild hearing loss and related aural deficiencies.\nPowerful, Punchy Bass with clear vocals: Drop the bass and listen to clear vocals with dual 11mm + 6mm dual drivers, delivering a precisely boosted sound profile designed to move you.\n3Mic AI for better call and noise cancellation. IP55 Water, Dust and Sweat resistant.","rating":4.6,"price":12000.0,"offer":20.0,"type":"headphones","brand":"oneplus","category":"electronics","merchantId":1248,"quantity":300,"status":"ACTIVE","thumbnailURL":"https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/512ch1TdARL._AC_UY218_.jpg","productImageURLs":["https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/31AoPyLzIlL._SX38_SY50_CR,0,0,38,50_.jpg","https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/31v88QTDtBL._SX38_SY50_CR,0,0,38,50_.jpg","https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/41j8qTbSj3L._SX38_SY50_CR,0,0,38,50_.jpg","https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/31Z4B9CccRL._SX38_SY50_CR,0,0,38,50_.jpg"],"searchTags":["one S23 Ultra 5G (Phantom Black, 12GB, 256GB Storage)","description":"Brand\tSamsung\nModel Name\tSamsung Galaxy S23 Ultra\nNetwork Service Provider\tUnlocked for All Carriers\nOperating System\tAndroid 13.0\nCellular Technology\t5G\nAbout this item\nMore innovation, less footprint – Galaxy S23 Ultra's striking symmetrical design returns with one major difference: recycled and eco-conscious materials. From the metal frame to the glass finish, it's polished with fresh new colors inspired by nature.\nNote's signature tool comes built in - The built-in S Pen keeps the legacy of Note alive. Plus, it helps you ditch the dependency on notebooks, making sketches and jotting notes effortless and eco-friendly.\nLow light. Camera. Action - A Pro-grade Camera grabs brighter photos and video, dusk to dawn. The intelligent pixel sensor adapts to low light with Nightography and the camera lens tones down flare for clearer captures\n200MP. Wow-worthy resolution - Resolution on the Wide-angle Camera has nearly doubled, delivering strikingly clear photos. Zoom and crop your shots for a whole new view —or leave it intact for brilliant detail, corner to corner.\nPower for those who don't pause - Your quest for epic mobile gaming is over. Snapdragon 8 Gen 2 Mobile Platform for Galaxy optimizes and streamlines your device for silky smooth games —without draining the Ninja Call Pro Plus 1.83\" Smart Watch with Bluetooth Calling, AI Voice","title":"Fire-Boltt Ninja Call Pro Plus ","description":"【1.83\" HD Display Smart Watch】- The 46.48mm (1.83-inch) HD display makes the display clear and true-to-life, with vivid colours ensuring smooth readability and keeping the watch as exquisite to look at as when you first lay your eyes on it. The watch has a 280 NITS Peak Brightness\nThis fashion smart watch will work on a single charge for about 8 days (without Bluetooth calling) and about 5 Days with Bluetooth calling.\nCharging Specs - The watch needs to be charged for 2 hours to reach 100%. The charger should be a 3.7V to 5V adapter or any laptop output. For a bare minimum of 20% charge the watch needs to be charged for about 30-40 mins\nYou cannot store Music in the watch, you can only control the music. 【AI Voice Assistant】- With built-in Voice assistant, you can simply speak to the smartwatch & get things done on your command\nThere is no volume control, however when connected to bt calling you can control the volume of the call. 【Bluetooth Calling Watch】- Fire-Boltt Ninja Call Pro Plus Smartwatch enables you to make and receive calls directly from your watch via the built-in speaker and microphone.","rating":0.0,"price":1500.0,"offer":20.0,"type":"watch","brand":"boat","category":"electronics","merchantId":1248,"quantity":100,"status":"ACTIVE","thumbnailURL":"https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/41QzYzs+JuL._SS40_.jpg","productImageURLs":["https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/519qtVWP7vL._SS40_.jpg","https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/41bgvTdZMBL._SS40_.jpg"],"searchTags":["fire bolt ninja plus","ninja","fire bolt","watch","digital watch"],"reviews":[],"createdDateTime":"2023-09-13T12:58:41.377","zoneId":"ALPHA"},{"productId":109,"name":"Bluetooth portable speaker","title":"Zebronics ZEB-COUNTY 3W Wireless Bluetooth Portable Speaker","description":"Zeb-county is a compact and handy portable speaker that comes with multi-connectivity options like wireless BT/USB/micro SD and AUX. approx. 10 hrs\n1 Year warranty-from the date of purchase\nTo connect to FM: Switch the speaker to FM mode and connect the micro USB cable to the micro USB port of the speaker and leave the other end watch","title":"watch","description":"1.38” TFT display: Featuring a vibrant round display and a stylish metallic finish, the smartwatch offers a premium on-screen experience.\nTru SyncTM: Hassle-free pairing, stable connectivity and lower battery consumption combine to provide the most advanced calling experience.\nNoise Buzz: Manage calls directly from your wrist. Access your call logs, make calls from the dial pad and save up to 10 favourite contacts.\nNoise Health SuiteTM: Take better care of your daily health with a series of health monitoring tools – Blood oxygen monitor, Sleep monitor, 24x7 heart rate monitor, Stress measurement, Breathe practice & Female cycle tracker.\n100 sports modes: Indulge in the routine of your preference with several sports modes to choose from.\nUp to 7-day battery: Breeze through an entire week without charging with up to 7 days of battery life. Get up to 2 days of battery life when calling in enabled.\n100+ watch faces: A series of fun and trendy watch faces let you swap into a new background every ","title":"OnePlus Buds Pro 2 - Obsidian Black ","description":"Brand\tONEPLUS\nModel Name\tBuds Pro 2\nColor\tObsidian Black\nForm Factor\tIn Ear\nConnectivity Technology\tWireless\nAbout this item\nSound Made Smart: Balance powerful sound with pure silence. Hybrid Active Noise Cancellation keeps you in control of your audio. Enjoy crystal-clear calls and a truly personal music listening experience. Powered by worry-free battery life, savor a symphony of powerful features for on-the-go studio-grade sound.\nCalling loud and clear: AI-powered noise reduction algorithms and three ENC noise-reducing microphones deliver precisely calibrated voice isolation during calls. Elegant and functional, the curved design of the buds further reduces wind and residual noise-pickup. For crystal-clear calls, the ONEPLUS Buds Pro 2 dominate the conversation.\nSuperior Audio Experience: Powerful, Punchy Bass – Drop the bass with 11mm dynamic drivers that bring your acoustics to life. ONEPLUS Audio ID – Hear and feel every note on your playlist with a personalized hearing profile for a precisely tailored audio experience.","rating":4.8,"price":10000.0,"offer":25.0,"type":"headphones","brand":"one plus","category":"electronics","merchantId":1248,"quantity":105,"status":"ACTIVE","thumbnailURL":"https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/619qlC03-JL._AC_SX679_.jpg","productImageURLs":["https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/41S1-O8LIZL._AC_SR38,50_.jpg","https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/41Vg0CSKmZL._AC_SR38,50_.jpg","https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/6138D3hmoiL._AC_SX679_.jpg","https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/71zYDBVeMYL._AC_SX679_.jpg"],"searchTags":["Buds Pro 2","one plus earbuds","earphone","earbuds"],"reviews":[{"reviewId":16029,"shopperId":207628,"shopperName":"vasanth Kulkarni","heading":"earbuds","description":"super","rating":5.0,"dateTime":"2025-01-21T15:20:11.48"},{"reviewId":22060,"shopperId":286068,"shopperName":"Vikas Patil","heading":"earbuds","description":"Verygood","rating":5.0,"dateTime":"2025-08-16T12:31:04.666"},{"reviewId":23641,"shopperId":315493,"shopperName":"madhu shopper","heading":"dthgkj","description":"jfryduyuiu","rating":4.0,"dateTime":"2025-11-01T11:02:11.042"},{"reviewId":27592,"shopperId":364828,"shopperName":"Dinga Dingii","heading":"good","description":"good one","rating":5.0,"dateTime":"2026-03-10T16:13:17.936"}],"createdDateTime":"2023-09-13T13:01:15.721","zoneId":"ALPHA"},{"productId":122,"name":"power bank","title":"power bank","description":"Why buy Xiaomi Mi 20000mAh 3-Port Power Bank\n\n \n\nType-C and Micro USB Charging Ports offers with perfect compatibility\n20000 mAh Battery Capacity offers efficient usage\n3 Charging Ports ensures charging of 3 devices\n \n\nWhen you get Xiaomi Mi 20000mAh 3-Port Power Bank online, you also get the awesome charging companion for your smartphones. The charger should be a 3.7V to 5V adapter or any laptop output. For a bare minimum of 20% charge the watch needs to be charged for about 30-40 mins\nYou cannot store Music in the watch, you can only control the music. 【Gaming On Wrist】- Enjoy playing games on the wrist itself as you are on the go. 【Breathe Function】- Ensure your breathing exercise is fit and healthy with the breathing function.\nThere is no volume control, however when connected to bt calling you can control the volume of the call. 【Smartphone Notifications】- Get all your mobile phone notifications on this 1.3\" Round Display Full touch smartwatch and never be late for a meeting, party or date.\nSupported Applications - Notifcations from all social media channels (Instagram, Whatsapp, Facebook), Call Notifications, Health Tracking (SpO2, Heart Rate, Sleep), Sports Tracking & many more\n【120+ Sports Modes】- Track each activity effectively with this smartwatch & activity tracker. Track your calories, steps and much more while you are on your fitness journey. This fitness tracker has it all;【In Built Mic & Speaker】- Get HD calling experience with this power-packed watch. Enhance the look of your wrist with attractive colors and sleek finish\n【Smart Health】- With the latest HRS3300 technology track your heart rate anytime of the day or even while you perform some activity. The optical sensors assure results so accurate. Monitor your blood oxygen levels to stay fit and healthy\n","rating":4.0,"price":1300.0,"offer":50.0,"type":"watch","brand":"fire-boltt 1.83” HD Full Touch Display for smooth swipes and clear vision\n【100 workout modes】- This smartwatch consists of 60 sports mode to track. Count steps, distance, and calories burned\nCharging Specs - The watch needs to be charged for 3 hours to reach 100%. The charger should be a 3.7V to 5V adapter or any laptop output. For a bare minimum of 20% charge the watch needs to be charged for about 30-40 mins\n【SPO2/ Oxygen, Heart Rate】 - Fire-Boltt Ninja 3 Plus Smartwatch comes with real time 24*7 SPO2 / Blood Oxygen tracking, Dynamic Heart Rate Monitoring (If a patient is suffering from Covid 19 please use a medical device prescribed by the Doctor)\n【IP68 Water Resistant】- This smartwatch can withstand dust, spills, raindrops and is sweatproof too\nSupported Applications - Notifcations from all social media channels (Instagram, Whatsapp, Facebook), Call Notifications, Health Tracking (SpO2, Heart Rate, Sleep), Sports Tracking & many more\n【POWERFUL BATTERY】 - About 7 days battery life and a Standby Time of 25 Days\n\n","rating":4.0,"price":8000.0,"offer":40.0,"type":"watch","brand":"fire-boltt","category":"electronics","merchantId":1248,"quantity":50,"status":"ACTIVE","thumbnailURL":"https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/61TlgEodcGL._AC_UY218_.jpg","productImageURLs":["https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/41uIEByMouL._SS40_.jpg","https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/41l79-yqLFL._SS40_.jpg","https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/51BmT7WIfIL._SS40_.jpg"],"searchTags":["boltt","fire","watch"],"reviews":[{"reviewId":19499,"shopperId":245449,"shopperName":"nemmalla sai","heading":"vaseline","description":"good product","rating":4.0,"dateTime":"2025-05-09T16:51:59.708"}],"createdDateTime":"2023-09-13T13:02:48.137","zoneId":"ALPHA"},{"productId":126,"name":"HELIO","title":" Emergency Rechargeable LED Lantern","description":"\nLight Source Type\tLED\nBrand\tPHILIPS\nColour\tGrey\nPower Source\tBattery Powered\nMaterial\tSynthetic\nAbout this item\nHigh Quality LED Light: The LED technology integrated in Helio Emergency Lantern is a uniquely developed solution by Philips. While instantly turned on, it enables an optimal light output and brings out vivid colors in your home\nThree Lighting Modes: Philips Helio Emergency lantern comes with three different lighting modes i.e., the Head light mode (can be used as torch), dim light and strong light (can be used as emergency light or as an emergency lantern)\nCharging & Backup Time: Philips Helio emergency lantern comes with overcharge and deep discharge protection. The emergency torch and lantern take up to 8 hours to completely charge. The head light(torch) comes with an 8 hours of battery backup and if used as a lantern it runs for 2.5 hours with front strong light and 8 hours with front dim light\nRechargeable Battery: The lantern comes with a high-quality rechargeable battery of 2200 mAH Lithium-Ion battery.","rating":6.0,"price":1500.0,"offer":10.0,"type":"electronic-accessories","brand":"phillips","category":"electronics","merchantId":1248,"quantity":20,"status":"ACTIVE","thumbnailURL":"https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/610ORH71n3L._SX425_.jpg","productImageURLs":["https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/610ORH71n3L._SX425_.jpg","https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/51Kz9PnVMrL._SX425_.jpg"],"searchTags":["rechargeable","phillips","LIGHT"],"reviews":[{"reviewId":2762,"shopperId":32137,"shopperName":"shilpaN","heading":"good product","description":"wowwwwwwwwwwwwwwww","rating":6.0,"dateTime":"2024-01-12T20:59:58.863"}],"createdDateTime":"2023-09-13T13:04:31.063","zoneId":"ALPHA"},{"productId":127,"name":"Triphala Juice ","title":"All-in-one Digestive Care Solution | Long term constipation, digestive problem relief supplement | Improves Gut Health | 100 % Ayurvedic Formula","description":"\nItem Form\tLiquid\nBrand\tVANSAAR\nDiet Type\tVegetarian\nMaterial Feature\tVegetarian\nRecommended Uses For Product\tHelps Weight Management & Constipation Relief\nAbout this item\nEFFECTIVE CONSTIPATION RELIEF: Vansaar Tripahala juice, a natural colon cleanser juice, enriched with Amla, Baheda & Haritaki, helps ease constipation, detox the colon, soothe the intestinal walls, and strengthen digestive health. Regular intake of this stomach cleanser juice promotes proper digestion & absorption of food thereby regulating easy bowel movements.\nRELIEVES ACIDITY, ACID REFLUX, HYPER ACIDITY: Vansaar Triphala Juice is loaded with natural Ayurvedic herbs like Amla, Harad and Baheda, a potent combination of 3 efficacious herbs that help relieve acidity, indigestion, acid reflux & hyper acidity naturally.\nMAINTAINS A HEALTHY & STRONG DIGESTIVE SYSTEM: Triphala juice from Vansaar is a natural gut cleanse juice which helps treat major digestive issues from the root naturally and improve overall digestion and gut health. Including this digestive care juice in your daily routine helps improve digestion, facilitate easy bowel wellness, and maintain a healthy & strong digestive system naturally.\nIMPROVES OVER ALL GUT HEALTH & METABOLISM: Vansaar Triphala Juice is formulated basis ayurvedic scriptures with high-quality herbs. This 100% natural solution is made with the best quality, sourced Amla, Haritaki & Baheda. Baheda helps to boost gut health naturally. 3 potent herb solution, helps strengthen overall digestive health for long term relief from all digestive issues.\nJUST POUR, MIX & DRINK IN 3 EASY STEPS- Pour 30 ml of Vansaar Triphala juice and mix with a glass of water and drink twice daily for best results.","rating":0.0,"price":500.0,"offer":10.0,"type":"boys-tshirt","brand":"vansaar","category":"beauty","merchantId":1248,"quantity":10,"status":"ACTIVE","thumbnailURL":"https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/61a9+XSOI2L._SX569_.jpg","productImageURLs":["https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/616JXjftWpL._SX569_.jpg","https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/61jddx9+GlL._SX569_.jpg","https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/61id2KCUZvL._SX569_.jpg"],"searchTags":["digetion"],"reviews":[{"reviewId":27411,"shopperId":364542,"shopperName":"vghhg adep","heading":"hhh","description":"hkhk","rating":5.0,"dateTime":"2026-03-10T15:58:21.378"}],"createdDateTime":"2023-09-13T13:04:31.064","zoneId":"ALPHA"},{"productId":128,"name":"vivo v21","title":"android","description":"\nBrand\tVivo\nModel Name\tVivo V21 (Arctic White, 8GB RAM, 128GB ROM)\nNetwork Service Provider\tUnlocked for All Carriers\nOperating System\tAndroid 11 - Funtouch OS 11.1\nCellular Technology\t5G\nAbout this item\n64MP+8MP+2MP Rear Camera | 44MP Selfie Camera\n16.65cm (6.44\") AMOLED Display with 90 Hz refresh rate and 2404 x 1080 pixels resolution.\nMemory & SIM: 8GB RAM | 128GB internal memory | Dual SIM (nano+nano) dual-standby (5G).\nFuntouch OS 11.1 (based on Android 11) operating system with Mediatek Dimensity 800U processor.\n33W flash charging with 4000mAh battery (Type-C).\n› See more product details\n","rating":0.0,"price":35000.0,"offer":30.0,"type":"mobile","brand":"vivo","category":"electronics","merchantId":1248,"quantity":50,"status":"ACTIVE","thumbnailURL":"https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/61ShleYhcBS._SY741_.jpg","productImageURLs":["https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/31uzwdGtG9S._SX38_SY50_CR,0,0,38,50_.jpg","https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/31uzwdGtG9S._SX38_SY50_CR,0,0,38,50_.jpg"],"searchTags":["vivo v21 5g","5g","v21","vivo"],"reviews":[],"createdDateTime":"2023-09-13T13:05:18.989","zoneId":"ALPHA"},{"productId":129,"name":"wrist watch","title":"apple","description":"【Compatible Models】: VEMIGON Watch Strap compatible with Apple Watch 38mm 40mm 41mm for iWatch Series 8, Series 7, Series 6, Series 5, Series 4, Series SE/SE2, Series 3, Series 2, Series 1 (Not included iWatch).\n【Unique Folding Buckle】: This sport band using high-quality magnetic metal folding buckle,with texture, more convenient to wear than the bow buckle, automatic magnetic suction, two seconds to wear your Apple watch.\n【Skin-friendly Material】: Fashion skin-friendly silicone watch bands, waterproof, sweat-proof and soft, comfortable to wear and easy to use. The material is harmless to human skin and is not allergic. A simple and Smooth Shape, and is More Aesthetic.\n【Suitable for many occasions】: Simple and stylish watch strap. Available in a variety of colors to match your watch and how you wear it. Suitable for various occasions, whether it's business, school, work, party, sports, etc., provides a professional look for any occasion. It is the best gift for parents, lovers, friends and yourself.\n【Adjustable Size】: Two sizes are available for you to choose from. 38mm/40mm/41mm size fits 5.1inch-7.4inch(130mm-190mm) wrists, 42mm/44mm/45mm/49mm size fits 5.5inch-8.2inch(140mm-210mm) wrists. Stands up. Unfolds. The Galaxy Z Fold5 does a lot in one hand with its 15.73 cm(6.2-inch) Cover Screen. Unfolded, the 19.21 cm(7.6-inch) Main Screen lets you really get into the zone. Pushed-back bezels and the Under Display Camera means there's more screen and no black dot getting between you and the breathtaking Infinity Flex Display.\nDo more than more with Multi View. Whether toggling between texts or catching up on emails, take full advantage of the expansive Main Screen with Multi View. PC-like power in your pocket transforms apps optimized with One UI to give you menus and more in a glance\nNew Taskbar for PC-like multitasking. Wipe out tasks in fewer taps. Add apps to the Taskbar for quick navigation and bouncing between windows when you're in the groove. And with App Pair, one tap launches up to three apps, all sharing one super-productive screen\nOur toughest Samsung Galaxy foldables ever. From the inside out, Galaxy Z Fold5 is made with materials that are not only stunning, but stand up to life's bumps and fumbles. The front and rear panels, made with exclusive Corning Gorilla Glass Victus2, are ready to resist sneaky scrapes and scratches. With our toughest aluminum frame made with Armor Aluminum, this is one durable smartphone.\nWorld’s first water resistant foldable smartphones. Be adventurous, rain or shine. You don't have to sweat the forecast when you've got one of the world's first water-resistant foldable smartphones.","rating":2.5,"price":164999.0,"offer":30.0,"type":"mobile","brand":"sansung","category":"electronics","merchantId":1248,"quantity":20,"status":"ACTIVE","thumbnailURL":"https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/71RLYJvBidL._SX522_.jpg","productImageURLs":["https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/61bjfEWCd5L._SX522_.jpg","https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/71aD7cnkttL._SX522_.jpg","https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/61qVnohMTPL._SX522_.jpg","https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/71RLYJvBidL._SX522_.jpg"],"searchTags":["offer","galaxy","snapdragon","5g","fold","z","samsung"],"reviews":[{"reviewId":1522,"shopperId":18195,"shopperName":"Parimal","heading":"review","description":"Good Airdopes 131","title":"boat airdopes","description":"With Mic:Yes\nBluetooth version: 5.0 / 5.1\nWireless range: 10 m\nCharging time: 2 Hours\nPlayback Time: Upto 15 to 60 Hours Playback\nASAP Charge: 5 Mins Charge= 90 Mins Playback\n13MM Drivers\n7.IPX4: Sweat Resistance\n\nAre you looking for a wireless earbud-type headset that delivers an impressive playback time? If your answer is yes, bring home the boAt Airdopes 131 that comes with a carrying case. This carrying case also acts as a 650 mAh portable charger that extends the playback time of these earbuds by up to 15 hours, i.e. 4 times its normal charging capacity. The normal battery capacity of each of these earbuds is 40 mAh and this delivers up to 3 hours of playback time. These earbuds feature Bluetooth v5.0 technology that delivers a stable connection that lets your rock on without connectivity issues. The stereo calling feature of these earbuds allows you to enjoy calls via its built-in microphone and 13-mm drivers. These earbuds are powered up by the IWP Technology featured in them the moment you open the case. The presence of a Type-C charging port ensures you can easily charge it with any charger that has a compatible DETAILS: USB port for convenient device charging with 1.2 meters USB Cable. with 5V micro USB charging cord, which also can be charged by computer, laptop and power bank. This Table Lamp is Operated with Touch and can be easily adjusted with it Flexible Body features.\nPORTABLE DESIGN: The small and portable design, which means you, can fold easily to carry it wherever you go. Soft and high quality goosenecks hose of with flexible 360 degree can be bending at your will.\nCHARGING INDICATOR: WOOUM Table Lamp comes with charging indicator but there are no indicator available which shows full battery charge or level of battery charged. Connect the USB power cord to the USB adapter for charging. It is being charged as the red indication light on. Charge fully at least once every 3 months if it is not in use. Lightweight and compact size convenient to carry and for your travel. Backup time - 120 minutes.\nNOTE: PLEASE DO NOT USE WHILE CHARGING, PLEASE DO NOT TURN ON WHILE CHARGING. Packing contents: 1 X Light; 1 x USB charging line. Switch Type: Touch Light , Brightness : Touch Dimming , Light Source: LED Bulbs.\nENERGY AND RECHARGEABLE: This Rechargeable WOOUM Table Lamp has a twin AC-DC Function. You can charge It fully in 3 to 4 hours and then can use it on the DC mode when there is a power failure. You can operate by AC power directly when there is electricity through adapter. Low consumption and long lifespan. Besides, it is a good choice for your family as emergency lighting when there is a sudden power outage.\nUSAGE: Furnish and light up your desk with this luxurious WOOUM Rechargeable LED Desk lamp. The table lamp comes with high bright LED lights. You can easily control the intensity of the light with dimming features. Bright LED light source, 3 adjustable levels, no radiation, no ultraviolet, no flicker, eye-friendly and energy efficient.\nLIGHTING HOURS:- Lights resists heating up and lasts for 120 Minutes if used under strongest light setting and 2-3 hours if used under weak light setting. Surface light source is more protective of the EYES. Operating off of easy-to-use, touch-sensitive control, this LED desk lamp is perfect for quick, versatile lighting. Launched UltraCharge 20,000mAh QCPD Power Bank,USB C/B Input,Tripple output 22.5W High-Speed Power Delivery,Compatible to iPhone 14 13 12 11 Samsung S22 S23 S21 Google Pixel7 Oneplus Brand: FLiX","description":"\nConnector Type\tDual USB Type A (Output port), Micro USB Type B (Output port), USB Type C (Input and Output port)\nBrand\tFLiX\nBattery Capacity\t20000 Milliamp Hours\nColour\tBlack\nSpecial Feature\tBIS Certified, Auto Shut-Off, LED Indicator Lights, QC+PD Super Fast charging Support\nAbout this item\n✅ [Lightning-Fast Charging] With a powerful 22.5W Quick Charge Power Delivery output, our power bank ensures lightning-fast charging for your devices. Say goodbye to long waiting times and enjoy swift power backup that keeps up with your fast-paced lifestyle. LED indicators provide clear status updates on the power bank's charge level.\n✅ [High-Capacity Battery] The 20,000mAh capacity provides ample power to keep your devices charged throughout the day. It offers multiple recharges for your smartphone iPhone Pro Max 3 charges, iPhone 13 4.4 charges, Samsung S23 3.4 charges, Google pixel 6 2.8 charges, ipad Mini 3 charges or other USB-powered devices, ensuring you stay connected whenever and wherever you need it\n✅ [Triple Output and Dual Input] With two USB Type-A ports and one Type-C port, our power bank allows you to charge up to three devices simultaneously. Whether you need to power up your smartphone, tablet, Bluetooth earphones, or other USB-enabled devices, our power bank has got you covered. You can choose to recharge the power bank using either the Micro USB (Type B) or Type-C input. This flexibility ensures compatibility with various charging cables and devices, making it hassle-free to recharge the power bank itself\n✅ [Safety] Experience the safest charging with our FLiX Powerbanks, we use only the highest-grade materials with all the safety regulations like current identification, over-current, electrostatic, overload protection, and temperature control, so we do have the confidence to provide an industry-leading 400 days warranty\n✅ [Compact and Durable] With its compact size and sleek profile, our power bank effortlessly fits into your pocket, bag, or purse. It takes up minimal space, making it ideal for travel, commuting, or any on-the-go adventures, Built to last, our power bank is crafted using high-quality materials that ensure durability and longevity. It can handle the rigors of daily use, including accidental drops or impacts, without compromising its performance\n✅ [Compatibility] This is a universal Powerbank which can charger all the devices like mobile phones, Tablets, Headphones / Neckbands, Smartwatches and many more, supports all new models Smartphones like iPhone 14, iPhone 13, iPhone 12, iPhone 11, Samsung Galaxy S23 Samsung Galaxy S22, Samsung Galaxy S21, Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 3/4, Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 4, Google Pixel 7, Google Pixel 6, Oneplus 11, Oneplus 10, Vivo V21, Vivo V25, Redmi Note 12, Realme 11 Pro and many more","rating":5.0,"price":4999.0,"offer":56.0,"type":"power-bank","brand":"flix(beetel)","category":"electronics","merchantId":28810,"quantity":150,"status":"ACTIVE","thumbnailURL":"https://images-eu.ssl-images-amazon.com/images/I/41bgyhEVLmL._AC_UL232_SR232,232_.jpg","productImageURLs":["https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/71yHGCI55vL._SL1200_.jpg","https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/612cXst7lmL._SL1200_.jpg","https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/518QApLFFxL._SL1200_.jpg","https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/41bgyhEVLmL._SL1000_.jpg"],"searchTags":["charging","FLiX(Beetel)","flix","20000mah","power bank"],"reviews":[{"reviewId":18404,"shopperId":236027,"shopperName":"customer shopping","heading":"power bank","description":"super and beautifull on time ","rating":5.0,"dateTime":"2025-04-09T10:44:46.175"}],"createdDateTime":"2023-12-28T10:54:40.989","zoneId":"ALPHA"},{"productId":2648,"name":"Scott International Men's Quilted Puffer Jacket","title":"Scott International Men's Quilted Puffer Jacket - Lightweight, Water Repellant, Elastic Cuffs, Zipped Pockets, Casual Winter Jacket - Stylish Outerwear for Men","description":"Product details\nMaterial composition100% Nylon\nStylePuffer Jacket\nFit typeRegular\nLengthStandard Length\nPatternSolid\nCare instructionsMachine Wash\nCountry of OriginIndia\nAbout this item\nLightweight Warmth, Premium Zippers, and Water Repellency: Embrace the cold with confidence in our Men's Quilted Puffer Jacket. Crafted with lightweight materials, it offers cozy warmth without the bulk. The best-quality YKK zippers ensure durability and ease of use, while the puffer horizontal quilting enhances insulation. Plus, it's water-repellent to keep you dry in drizzles.\nSmart Zippered Pockets: Stay organized and keep your essentials secure with multiple zippered pockets. Whether you're stashing your keys, wallet, or phone, you'll have easy access to your items while on the move.\nComfort in Every Stitch: Our puffer jacket features soft elastic sleeve cuffs, providing a snug fit that keeps cold air out. Enjoy unrestricted movement and unbeatable comfort throughout your day.\nVersatile Style: Elevate your winter wardrobe with this stylish and functional puffer jacket. It's perfect for both casual outings and outdoor adventures, allowing you to stay warm while looking effortlessly cool.\nExceptional Quality: Scott International is committed to providing top-notch quality. This quilted puffer jacket is no exception. It's designed to withstand the elements, so you can enjoy long-lasting comfort and style.\nAdditional Information\nManufacturerSwitz Inc, Bengaluru, Switz Inc, Bengaluru\nPackerSwitz Inc, Name\t15s-fq3071TU\nScreen Size\t39.6 Centimetres\nColour\tSilver\nHard Disk Size\t512 GB\nCPU Model\tCeleron\nRAM Memory Installed Size\t8 GB\nOperating System\tWindows 11 Home\nSpecial Feature\tBrightview, HD, Micro-Edge Display, Numeric Keypad\nGraphics Card Description\tIntegrated\nSee more\nAbout this item\n【2-core Intel Celeron N4500】2 threads and 4MB L3 cache deliver fast processing speeds. The Intel UHD graphics help you dive into crisp, stunning visuals.\n【Upgraded memory and storage】8GB DDR4 RAM and 512GB PCIe NVMe M.2 SSD allow you to undertake improved multitasking with high-bandwidth memory and ample storage. Now, browse or work as you please.\n【Micro-edge display】The 15.6-inch, HD, 250-nit, and micro-edge display immerses you in your projects, helping you explore intricate details on a large screen.\n【Effortless connectivity】Wi-Fi 5 (2x2) and Bluetooth 5.0 make you unstoppable with a dependable connection. Stay plugged in with 1 x USB Type-C, 2 x USB Type-A, and 1 x HDMI 1.4b ports.\n【Long battery life】With HP Fast Charge, power up your device up to 50% in 45 mins. Once done, get ready to go where work takes you backed up with a long-lasting 41Wh battery life.\n【Business conferencing】HP True Vision 720p HD camera with integrated dual array mics and dual speakers enables you to put your point across with utmost clarity in high resolution.\n【Why HP】Experience the unparalleled advantages of choosing HP, the most preferred and trusted PC brand by Indians, which empowers you with cutting-edge technology and steadfast dependability.\n【Pre-loaded Win 11 and MS Office】Comes with Win 11 and MS Office 2021. To activate your MS Office, sign in or sign up, and follow the Office Activation Wizard.\n【Sustainably made】Make an environmentally conscious choice with a thoughtfully designed laptop that contains recycled plastics and is EPEAT Silver registered and ENERGY STAR certified.\n【Reliable design】A sleek yet sturdy laptop that delivers rock-solid performance all day long with power-packed features, optimized heat management, and 1-year on-site standard warranty.\n","rating":0.0,"price":29190.0,"offer":14.0,"type":"","brand":"hp laptop 15s, intel celeron, 15.6-inch (39.6 cm), hd, 8gb ddr4, 512gb ","Voltage Regulator","regulator","spare "],"reviews":[],"createdDateTime":null,"zoneId":"ALPHA"},{"productId":3059,"name":"Mobile","title":"Samsung s22 ultra","description":"he Samsung Galaxy S22 Ultra is the headliner of the S22 series. It's the first S series phone to include Samsung's S Pen. Specifications are top-notch including 6.8-inch Dynamic AMOLED display with 120Hz refresh rate, Snapdragon 8 Gen 1 processor, 5000mAh battery, up to 12gigs of RAM, and 1TB of storage. In the camera department, a quad-camera setup is presented with two telephoto sensors.","rating":0.0,"price":125000.0,"offer":59.0,"type":"mobile","brand":"samsung PERSONALISED WATER BOTTLE - WARM PEACH","title":"Bottle","description":"This vacuum-insulated drink bottle has a luxurious, satin finish and a strong, double-walled stainless steel design allowing you to take your hydration partner with you wherever you go. Our bottle is shatterproof, condensation-free, and has a sturdy screw-top lid, making it more than just a pretty accessory. Make it perfect by personalising your accessory to keep you hydrated everywhere\n\n- Made from 18/8 Stainless Steel.\n- Capacity: 500ml & 750ml\n- Dimensions: For 500ml- 7cm (diameter) by 22.3cm (height),\nFor 750ml- 7cm (diameter) by 26cm (height)\n- 100% BPA Free and non toxic\n- Keeps your drink cold for up to 15 hours\n- Keeps your drink hot for up to 12 hours\n- Leakproof","rating":0.0,"price":1500.0,"offer":50.0,"type":"electronic-accessories","brand":"quench","category":"electronics","merchantId":83107,"quantity":100,"status":"ACTIVE","thumbnailURL":"https://www.themessycorner.in/cdn/shop/products/P3_76b0e82b-af75-461f-8ae7-d573fda61a70_60x.jpg?v=1674460041","productImageURLs":["https://www.themessycorner.in/cdn/shop/products/P2_700x.jpg?v=1674460041","https://www.themessycorner.in/cdn/shop/products/P3_76b0e82b-af75-461f-8ae7-d573fda61a70_60x.jpg?v=1674460041","https://www.themessycorner.in/cdn/shop/products/P4_700x.jpg?v=1674215518"],"searchTags":["peach bottle","branded","bottle"],"reviews":[],"createdDateTime":"2024-06-04T22:18:34.152","zoneId":"ALPHA"},{"productId":4019,"name":"FEW ITEMS LEFT ASYMMETRIC VOLUMINOUS DRESS","title":"dress","description":"Short dress with a straight neckline and exposed shoulders. iphone 13","IPHONE 13","Iphone 13","iphone 13"],"reviews":[],"createdDateTime":"2024-08-07T11:38:15.089","zoneId":"ALPHA"},{"productId":5413,"name":"Mobile","title":"Samsung Galaxy S23 Ultra 5G AI Smartphone (Green, 12GB, 256GB Storage)","description":"More innovation, less footprint – Galaxy S23 Ultra's striking symmetrical design returns with one major difference: recycled and eco-conscious materials. From the metal frame to the glass finish, it's polished with fresh new colors inspired by nature.\nNote's signature tool comes built in - The built-in S Pen keeps the legacy of Note alive. Plus, it helps you ditch the dependency on notebooks, making sketches and jotting notes effortless and eco-friendly.\nLow light. Camera. Action - A Pro-grade Camera grabs brighter photos and video, dusk to dawn. The intelligent pixel sensor adapts to low light with Nightography and the camera lens tones down flare for clearer captures\n200MP. Wow-worthy resolution - Resolution on the Wide-angle Camera has nearly doubled, delivering strikingly clear photos. Zoom and crop your shots for a whole new view —or leave it intact for brilliant detail, corner to corner.\nPower for those who don't pause - Your quest for epic mobile gaming is over. Snapdragon 8 Gen 2 Mobile Platform for Galaxy optimizes and streamlines your device for silky smooth games —without draining the battery","rating":0.0,"price":149999.0,"offer":43.0,"type":"","brand":"samsung","category":"electronics","merchantId":108346,"quantity":100,"status":"ACTIVE","thumbnailURL":"https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/71lD7eGdW-L._SL1500_.jpg","productImageURLs":["https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/61k2ydckuLL._SL1500_.jpg","https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/71g0eynUajL._SL1500_.jpg","https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/61WZtv4Xy-L._SL1500_.jpg"],"searchTags":["23 ultra","samsung galaxy 23 ultra"],"reviews":[],"createdDateTime":"2024-08-07T11:43:34.881","zoneId":"ALPHA"},{"productId":5417,"name":"laptop","title":"Apple 2024 MacBook Air 15″ Laptop with M3 chip: 38.91 cm (15.3″) Liquid Retina Display, 8GB Unified Memory, 256GB SSD Storage, Backlit Keyboard, 1080p FaceTime HD Camera, Touch ID- Midnight","description":"Supercharged by M3 — The blazing-fast MacBook Air with the M3 chip is a super-portable laptop that sails through work and play.\nPORTABLE DESIGN — Lightweight and just over 1 cm thin, so you can take MacBook Air anywhere you go.\nGET MORE DONE FASTER — The powerful 8-core CPU and 10-core GPU of the Apple M3 chip keep things running smoothly.\nUP TO 18 HOURS OF BATTERY LIFE — Amazing, all-day battery life so you can leave the power adapter at home.\nMORE ROOM FOR WHAT YOU LOVE — The 38.91 cm (15.3″) Liquid Retina display supports 1 billion colours.\nLOOK SHARP, SOUND GREAT — Everything looks and sounds amazing with a 1080p FaceTime HD camera, three mics and six speakers with Spatial Audio.\nAPPS FLY WITH APPLE SILICON — All your favourites, from Microsoft 365 to Adobe Creative Cloud, run lightning fast in macOS.","rating":0.0,"price":134900.0,"offer":9.0,"type":"","brand":"apple","category":"electronics","merchantId":108346,"quantity":34,"status":"ACTIVE","thumbnailURL":"https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/71O14N5GYLL._SL1500_.jpg","productImageURLs":["https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/71O14N5GYLL._SL1500_.jpg","https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/61BSo-tUthL._SL1500_.jpg"],"searchTags":["mac Covered in Warranty\nParts & Labour will be Covered Under Warranty Against Any Defect Arising Out of Faulty or Defective Material or Workmanship.\nWarranty Service Type\nFor any warranty related issues, please call the Customer Support - [1800 40 7267864][https://www.samsung.com/in/microsite/samsung-mall/contact-us/]\nInstallation & Demo\nInstallation & Demo Details\nWe'll facilitate the installation and demo through authorized service engineer at your convenience The installation will be done within 48 hours of delivery of the TV.The service engineer will install your new TV, either on wall mount or on table top. Immerse yourself in the captivating world of the 51.05mm (2.01 inch) large display, and a brilliant resolution of 240*296 pixels. Every detail comes to life with exceptional clarity and vibrancy with 320 NITS Peak Brightness\nMetal Body Design - Fire-Boltt Ninja Call Pro Max comes with a sleek and stunning metal body design. Unleash the power of longevity with impressive battery life. With up to 7 days of continuous usage and an astounding 15 days of standby time, this remarkable timepiece keeps up with your active lifestyle without missing a beat.\nBluetooth calling - Stay connected wherever you go with Bluetooth calling. Seamlessly make and receive calls directly from your wrist, without the need to reach for your phone.This men and women fashion smartwatch ensures crystal-clear audio quality, allowing you to have conversations with ease. The watch needs to be charged for 2 hours to reach 100%. The charger should be a 3.7V to 5V adapter or any laptop output\nCamera control and music control - Effortlessly snap photos and record videos right from your wrist. Adjust camera settings, frame your shots, and capture the perfect angle. Enjoy seamless control over your favorite tracks, playlists, and music apps with the music control feature. Music Cannot Be stored in the watch, Volume cannot be controlled\n120+ sports modes - Unlock your athletic potential with the smartwatch's extensive range of 120+ sports modes. From running and cycling to swimming and yoga, it offers specialized tracking and insights for a wide variety of sports and activities.","rating":0.0,"price":2500.0,"offer":3.0,"type":"watch","brand":"fire-boltt","category":"electronics","merchantId":258478,"quantity":10,"status":"ACTIVE","thumbnailURL":"data:image/jpeg;base64,/9j/4AAQSkZJRgABAQAAAQABAAD/2wCEAAkGBw8PEBUQEBAVFRUVFRUVFxUXFRgWFxUVFRYWFhcVFxUaHSggGholHBUYITEhJikrLi4uGCAzODM4NygtLysBCgoKDg0OGBAQGi0lHSUrLS0tLS0tLS0tLS0tLy0tLSstLS0tLS8tLSstLS0tLS0vKy0tLS0tLS0tKystNTUtNf/AABEIAOEA4QMBIgACEQEDEQH/xAAcAAABBAMBAAAAAAAAAAAAAAADAQIFBgAEBwj/xABFEAACAQMCAwUFBAgEBAYDAAABAgMABBESIQUxQQYTIlFhBzJxgZEUQqGxIzNSYnKCwfAWktHxQ6LC4SQ0Y3OTlBVTVP/EABgBAQEBAQEAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAABAgME/8QAIhEBAQEBAAMAAgEFAAAAAAAAAAERAgMhMRJBEyIycZHw/9oADAMBAAIRAxEAPwCepRWAU6gQClxSgUoFBgFKBS4pQKBMUuKUCnYoG4pcUuKg+P8AGJbSJ5mjBCgYUNkuzFVVc6dslsbZrHfc5muvi8N8m5ZM9+7/ANf9JvFLiq5c9obqGEyyWke7IkYS5D95I7qmjITbYk9fdxWrL2xlCvKtqjRLK0Sn7QBLKBJ3eqOIp4snOBnoa25LbisxVZHaW6llljtbJZVikePUblI2YpgMQjLnGTjPKpWbiiG5FqrqCulpSWA06v1cQ399zvj9kHzFBI4pMVUZe2sgTvltUaIymNMXA72Ud4YwyQ6N8kHbPQ77VKf/AJud7iSOG01wwv3ck5mVcMqh3CxkZYjIHMbnoN6CZxWYqC4T2l+0yW8awlTNA9wwL7xoG0LsB4tR5ctvpTOJ8cvYpxClij6y3dFrqONpQgBYqhBIxnl5UE9ikxVf4lx29h7vNgn6TQviu41/TOCe6G3iO3Pr0qY4bLNJGGnhEL5OUEgkwAdjqAxvzoD4pCKIRTSKAZFJTyKQigYRTaeaQigYaSnUlA2lrKWgMKUCsFOAoMApQKUCnAUCAU4CsApwFAgFOApQKcBQNAqK4/whrvuF1ARxzpLIDnLiPJCfAkjOfKpgCnYoK5xfs7r7hLcRRRwyPNo06R3oRhEQFGMB2ya1OF9j/sz2skfdM0MLRSa1JyxJcSRnHgYOzb9VbFW/FLpoKf2V7N3Vo6GU2rgd5qlEb/aDrLP+sO2NTcscq3IuAL3st0kcaylXWHIIALA6ppCviLueZznSANiTVk01mmgocXYqZjAsotI44HRgYI5O+IRiwj7yRidJJJNbjcB4ilu1tFPBiUzmWVlfvCZ3YkoFOAQp5knf4VcNNJpoKcOz99BcvLayWwQxRQosiSMUjiUAAaSOZyT8q37XhFw11HdXMkbGOBowqKwHeO+WcauQ0ALzqw4pCtBC8V4U89xbSalEcDvIynOWcrpjI6DSSTUmRRSKQigCRTSKMRTCKAZFNIohFNIoBkU0iiEU0igYaaaeabQJWUuKSg2AKcBSCnAUCgU4CsApwFBgFOApQKcBQRn291lk1qO6R1TUM5QlEbU/7uXxkcsDO24d9vfuFkwuTMI+RxpM/dZ589P41IrCoz4R4t22944A389gB8qxLSMKECKFBBC6RgEHUCByznf40GldXkiTaQgZFjV3AB14ZnXK9DjTyxk748ifh913pkwVKq4CleqmNHznruxrcES6tWBqwBnG+ASQM+WSfrSRcPiKugjQK2pnXSMMcblh1Jx1oNZ52FwsWBho3c+eVZAOvLxGoqXi0wjkkBUBDLhfs8zAiNmG8obSM6e 22.5W Fast Charging | Dual Output & Input | Charge 3 Devices Simultaneously | for Smartphones, TWS Earbuds, Speakers, Tablets (Black)","description":"Style Name: Black\nConnector Type\tMicro USB\nBrand\tamazon basics\nBattery Capacity\t20000 Milliamp Hours\nColour\tBlack - 20000 mAh\nSpecial Feature\tFast Charging\nAbout this item\nHigh Capacity: 20000 mAh capacity allows you to charge a 4000 mAh device up to 3.5 times.\nFast Charging: Supports 22.5W output for quick charging of smartphones, TWS earbuds, speakers, and tablet PCs.\nDual Output Ports: Equipped with USB-A and Type-C ports for versatile charging options.\nDual Input Ports: Features both Micro USB and Type-C input ports for flexible recharging options.\nSimultaneous Charging: Can charge up to three devices at the same time with 2 USB ports and 1 Type-C port.\nBidirectional Fast Charging: Supports bidirectional Type-C power delivery fast charging and quick charge technology for efficient power been crafted to bring the Dolby Audio experience to your TWS earbuds. With Immersio it feels like \"Cinema in your ears\". Crafted with love for OTT lovers, step into a whole new level of binge-watching with Dolby's signature sound where action is brought to life by elevating sound for a cinematic viewing experience. The audio expectation with powerfully engineered flagship TWS is to offer a perfect balance of Power and Clarity in your ears. These Bluetooth headsets have Quad-mic AI ENC for environmental noise reduction. paint","Nail Paint"],"reviews":null,"createdDateTime":"2025-07-31T18:25:22.68","zoneId":"ALPHA"},{"productId":13255,"name":"HeadPhones","title":"HeadSet","description":"Noise headsets are wireless audio devices designed by the Indian electronics brand Noise. Known for their stylish design and affordability, these headsets offer features like Bluetooth connectivity, passive noise isolation, long battery life, and touch controls. Popular among young users, Noise headsets are commonly used for music, calls, and gaming, and are often praised for delivering decent sound quality at a budget-friendly ml","title":"Rice Face Wash With Rice Water & Niacinamide for Glass Skin - 150 ml","description":"Want to achieve glass skin but don’t know where to start? We’ve got you! Introducing Mamaearth Rice Water Face Wash that deeply cleanses the grime & grease, leaving your skin dewy and refreshed. Enriched with the goodness of Rice Water, the face wash is rich in antioxidants that help reduce blemishes and dark spots. Unlike other face washes, its creamy texture doesn’t strip your skin’s essential moisture after cleansing. Instead, it adds a boost of hydration to your skin and locks it in! The goodness of Niacinamide in our Rice Face Wash reduces the appearance of acne marks and brightens your skin tone to give you that glass-like radiant skin that you’ve been wishing for! Shampoo with Rosemary & Methi Dana for Reducing Hair Loss & Breakage - 250 ml","title":"Rosemary Anti-Hair Fall Shampoo with Rosemary & Methi Dana for Reducing Hair Loss & Breakage - 250 ml","description":"Struggling with excessive hair loss? Mamaearth Rosemary Anti-Hair Fall Shampoo to the rescue! Crafted with the natural goodness of Rosemary, a super potent herb that’s proven to stimulate hair growth. The shampoo is also infused with Methi Dana - a time-tested ingredient that helps control hair fall.\nTogether, this power-packed duo packs quite a punch. In turn, the Rosemary Anti-Hair Fall Shampoo gives you up to 94% stronger hair* and results in up to 93% less hair fall. Rosemary strengthens weakened hair follicles and promotes hair growth while Methi Dana is extremely effective in controlling hair fall. It also strengthens the hair follicles and curbs hair shedding. The Rosemary Anti-Hair Fall Shampoo gently cleanses your scalp and hair while fortifying your locks with its nutrient-rich formulation.\nThat’s not all, Rosemary Anti-Hair Fall Shampoo is also Made Safe Certified, which means it contains no toxins or harmful chemicals and is enriched with nature’s finest ingredients ","rating":0.0,"price":349.0,"offer":50.0,"type":"cream","brand":"mamaearth","category":"beauty","merchantId":284643,"quantity":600,"status":"ACTIVE","thumbnailURL":"https://images.mamaearth.in/catalog/product/3/_/3_11.jpg?format=auto&height=600","productImageURLs":["https://images.mamaearth.in/catalog/product/4/_/4_5_.jpg?format=auto&height=600","https://images.mamaearth.in/catalog/product/1/_/1_7_white_bg.jpg?format=auto&height=600"],"searchTags":["Rosemary"],"reviews":null,"createdDateTime":null,"zoneId":"ALPHA"},{"productId":13725,"name":"Creamy Matte Long Stay Lipstick with Murumuru Butter ","title":"Creamy Matte Long Stay Lipstick with Murumuru Butter and Vitamin E - 4.2g | Cranberry Crush","description":"Get ready to pout out loud. for Hair | Hair straightener for woman with 73mm Large Paddle Design | Electric Comb for Women | Gifts for woman | PTC Fast Heat-Up (30s) | 2 Heat Settings (180°C & 210°C) | Auto Shut-Off & 360° Swivel Cord","description":"About this item\nLarge Paddle Brush (73 mm) – Covers More Hair for Faster Styling The hair straightening brush is designed with a wide paddle (73 mm) to style more strands in one pass, cutting down on styling time while ensuring smooth and sleek results.\nTriple Bristle Design with Ceramic Coating – Safe & Even Heat Distribution This straightener brush features ceramic-coated triple bristles, ensuring even heat distribution while minimizing hair damage and preventing burns, making styling safer and more effective.\nPTC Fast Heat-Up – Ready to Use in Just 30 Seconds – With PTC heating technology, this hair straightening comb heats up in just 30 seconds, so you can start styling instantly without waiting, perfect for last-minute touch-ups.\nTwo Temperature Settings – Adjustable for All Hair Types – Choose between 180°C for thin/medium hair and 210°C for thick hair with this straightening brush, ensuring customized styling based on your hair texture for straightener","title":"hair straightener","description":"Philips Heated Straightening Brush BHH885/10 will give you naturally straight hair in 5 minutes. Designed with SilkProtect Technology, ionic care and ceramic-argan oil infused bristles, this straightening brush is a great tool that will leave you with naturally straight, beautiful and shiny hair in just 5 minutes. Philips SilkProtect technology with ionic care system works together with the triple bristle design for healthy looking, frizz-free hair.\n\n\nFeatures:\n\nHeat straightening brush that helps give you naturally straight hair in 5 minutes.\nDesigned with SilkProtect technology, ionic care and ceramic argan oil infused bristles\nA great tool that leaves you with straight, beautiful and shiny hair\nIonic care helps give you frizz free hair\nLength of the large paddle shaped brush is 60 mm\n\nAbout the Brand: Philips is a leading health technology company focused to make the world healthier and more sustainable through innovation. The brand is a world leader in home healthcare, energy efficient lighting solutions, as well as male shaving, grooming and oral healthcare products. Focused on improving people\n\n\n\nExplore the entire range of Straighteners available on Nykaa. Shop more Philips products here.You can browse through the complete world of Philips Straighteners .\n\nCountry of Origin:  China\n\nManufacturer:  Philips\nAddress:  Imported By: Philips India NC","title":"760 NC","description":"\nBrand\tJBL\nModel Name\tTune\nColour\tBlack\nForm Factor\tOver Ear\nConnectivity Technology\t\nBluetooth 5.0\n\nAbout this item\nACTIVE NOISE CANCELLATION: Tune out the Noise & Tune in to your Music with JBL Tune 760NC wireless headset.\nJBL PURE BASS SOUND: For over 70 years, JBL has engineered the precise, impressive sound found in big venues around the world. These Bluetooth headphones reproduce that same JBL sound, punching out bass that’s both deep and powerful.\nUP TO 50 HOURS PLAYTIME: Listen wirelessly for up to 35 hours with Active Noise Cancellation or up to 50 hours without Noise Cancellation for long-lasting fun. Recharge the battery quickly in 2 hours or enjoy endlessly in wired mode using the detachable AUX cable provided.\nGOOGLE FAST PAIR: Thanks to Fast Pair enabled by Google, the JBL Tune 760NC are immediately connected to your Android device. You can also pair multiple devices just by tapping on the devices’ screen.\nDUAL PAIRING (MULTI-POINT CONNECTION): Allows you to effortlessly switch from one Bluetooth device to another. You can simply switch from a video on your tablet to a call on your mobile phone so that you’ll never miss a call.\n\n","rating":3.0,"price":6000.0,"offer":20.0,"type":"headphones","brand":"jbl","category":"electronics","merchantId":1248,"quantity":10,"status":"ACTIVE","thumbnailURL":"https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/31K0TGXVovL._SX300_SY300_QL70_FMwebp_.jpg","productImageURLs":["https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/51UFCmurtZL._SX522_.jpg","https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/619AhAz3GCL._SX522_.jpg","https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/61pXNw6JpLL._SX522_.jpg"],"searchTags":["Wireless","Headphones","JBL"],"reviews":[{"reviewId":12887,"shopperId":153868,"shopperName":"usha gowda","heading":"good","description":"sound clarity will  be good","rating":4.0,"dateTime":"2024-10-22T14:56:59.59"},{"reviewId":21908,"shopperId":285849,"shopperName":"shashi kumar","heading":"Very good","description":"Good","rating":5.0,"dateTime":"2025-08-16T12:30:31.953"},{"reviewId":27464,"shopperId":364202,"shopperName":"Akash Awati","heading":"Headphone ","description":"Quality is good","rating":3.0,"dateTime":"2026-03-10T16:01:06.008"},{"reviewId":27769,"shopperId":368509,"shopperName":"Siddu K R","heading":"Headphone","description":"super","rating":5.0,"dateTime":"2026-03-12T16:13:40.762"}],"createdDateTime":"2023-09-13T12:48:22.31","zoneId":"ALPHA"},{"productId":79,"name":"Oneplus buds pro2","title":"Oneplus buds","description":"Brand\tOnePlus\nModel Name\tBuds Pro\nColour\tArbor Green\nForm Factor\tIn Ear\nConnectivity Technology\tWireless, Bluetooth\nAbout this item\nSeamless connectivity: Instantaneous pairing with OnePlus smartphone, as soon as you open the charging case lid. It also has Google Fast Pair that helps to connect any android phones easily. To use earbuds functions, please upgrade the Wireless Earphones APP or OnePlus Buds APP to the latest version from Google Play.\nSpatial audio: Enjoy Spatial Audio with Dynamic Head Tracking feature that helps you experience sounds on a whole new level. Co-created with Dynaudio: Helps you achieve optimal listening experience. Smart Scene Noise Cancellation2.0 : Up to 48dB Ultra-wide frequency noise cancellation system with personalized ANC\nWorry-free Battery Life: Up-to 40 Hours Battery with quick charging 10 minutes for 3 hours of use with ANC on. Full charged earbud: up to 6h(music playback; ANC ON); up to 9h(music playback; ANC Off). OnePlus Audio ID2.0 : Personalize your audio via simple listening test at first time setup. This unique hearing profile ID allows one to enjoy the most optimal listening experience best suited to him or her by compensating for mild hearing loss and related aural deficiencies.\nPowerful, Punchy Bass with clear vocals: Drop the bass and listen to clear vocals with dual 11mm + 6mm dual drivers, delivering a precisely boosted sound profile designed to move you.\n3Mic AI for better call and noise cancellation. IP55 Water, Dust and Sweat resistant.","rating":4.6,"price":12000.0,"offer":20.0,"type":"headphones","brand":"oneplus","category":"electronics","merchantId":1248,"quantity":300,"status":"ACTIVE","thumbnailURL":"https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/512ch1TdARL._AC_UY218_.jpg","productImageURLs":["https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/31AoPyLzIlL._SX38_SY50_CR,0,0,38,50_.jpg","https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/31v88QTDtBL._SX38_SY50_CR,0,0,38,50_.jpg","https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/41j8qTbSj3L._SX38_SY50_CR,0,0,38,50_.jpg","https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/31Z4B9CccRL._SX38_SY50_CR,0,0,38,50_.jpg"],"searchTags":["one S23 Ultra 5G (Phantom Black, 12GB, 256GB Storage)","description":"Brand\tSamsung\nModel Name\tSamsung Galaxy S23 Ultra\nNetwork Service Provider\tUnlocked for All Carriers\nOperating System\tAndroid 13.0\nCellular Technology\t5G\nAbout this item\nMore innovation, less footprint – Galaxy S23 Ultra's striking symmetrical design returns with one major difference: recycled and eco-conscious materials. From the metal frame to the glass finish, it's polished with fresh new colors inspired by nature.\nNote's signature tool comes built in - The built-in S Pen keeps the legacy of Note alive. Plus, it helps you ditch the dependency on notebooks, making sketches and jotting notes effortless and eco-friendly.\nLow light. Camera. Action - A Pro-grade Camera grabs brighter photos and video, dusk to dawn. The intelligent pixel sensor adapts to low light with Nightography and the camera lens tones down flare for clearer captures\n200MP. Wow-worthy resolution - Resolution on the Wide-angle Camera has nearly doubled, delivering strikingly clear photos. Zoom and crop your shots for a whole new view —or leave it intact for brilliant detail, corner to corner.\nPower for those who don't pause - Your quest for epic mobile gaming is over. Snapdragon 8 Gen 2 Mobile Platform for Galaxy optimizes and streamlines your device for silky smooth games —without draining the Ninja Call Pro Plus 1.83\" Smart Watch with Bluetooth Calling, AI Voice","title":"Fire-Boltt Ninja Call Pro Plus ","description":"【1.83\" HD Display Smart Watch】- The 46.48mm (1.83-inch) HD display makes the display clear and true-to-life, with vivid colours ensuring smooth readability and keeping the watch as exquisite to look at as when you first lay your eyes on it. The watch has a 280 NITS Peak Brightness\nThis fashion smart watch will work on a single charge for about 8 days (without Bluetooth calling) and about 5 Days with Bluetooth calling.\nCharging Specs - The watch needs to be charged for 2 hours to reach 100%. The charger should be a 3.7V to 5V adapter or any laptop output. For a bare minimum of 20% charge the watch needs to be charged for about 30-40 mins\nYou cannot store Music in the watch, you can only control the music. 【AI Voice Assistant】- With built-in Voice assistant, you can simply speak to the smartwatch & get things done on your command\nThere is no volume control, however when connected to bt calling you can control the volume of the call. 【Bluetooth Calling Watch】- Fire-Boltt Ninja Call Pro Plus Smartwatch enables you to make and receive calls directly from your watch via the built-in speaker and microphone.","rating":0.0,"price":1500.0,"offer":20.0,"type":"watch","brand":"boat","category":"electronics","merchantId":1248,"quantity":100,"status":"ACTIVE","thumbnailURL":"https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/41QzYzs+JuL._SS40_.jpg","productImageURLs":["https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/519qtVWP7vL._SS40_.jpg","https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/41bgvTdZMBL._SS40_.jpg"],"searchTags":["fire bolt ninja plus","ninja","fire bolt","watch","digital watch"],"reviews":[],"createdDateTime":"2023-09-13T12:58:41.377","zoneId":"ALPHA"},{"productId":109,"name":"Bluetooth portable speaker","title":"Zebronics ZEB-COUNTY 3W Wireless Bluetooth Portable Speaker","description":"Zeb-county is a compact and handy portable speaker that comes with multi-connectivity options like wireless BT/USB/micro SD and AUX. approx. 10 hrs\n1 Year warranty-from the date of purchase\nTo connect to FM: Switch the speaker to FM mode and connect the micro USB cable to the micro USB port of the speaker and leave the other end watch","title":"watch","description":"1.38” TFT display: Featuring a vibrant round display and a stylish metallic finish, the smartwatch offers a premium on-screen experience.\nTru SyncTM: Hassle-free pairing, stable connectivity and lower battery consumption combine to provide the most advanced calling experience.\nNoise Buzz: Manage calls directly from your wrist. Access your call logs, make calls from the dial pad and save up to 10 favourite contacts.\nNoise Health SuiteTM: Take better care of your daily health with a series of health monitoring tools – Blood oxygen monitor, Sleep monitor, 24x7 heart rate monitor, Stress measurement, Breathe practice & Female cycle tracker.\n100 sports modes: Indulge in the routine of your preference with several sports modes to choose from.\nUp to 7-day battery: Breeze through an entire week without charging with up to 7 days of battery life. Get up to 2 days of battery life when calling in enabled.\n100+ watch faces: A series of fun and trendy watch faces let you swap into a new background every ","title":"OnePlus Buds Pro 2 - Obsidian Black ","description":"Brand\tONEPLUS\nModel Name\tBuds Pro 2\nColor\tObsidian Black\nForm Factor\tIn Ear\nConnectivity Technology\tWireless\nAbout this item\nSound Made Smart: Balance powerful sound with pure silence. Hybrid Active Noise Cancellation keeps you in control of your audio. Enjoy crystal-clear calls and a truly personal music listening experience. Powered by worry-free battery life, savor a symphony of powerful features for on-the-go studio-grade sound.\nCalling loud and clear: AI-powered noise reduction algorithms and three ENC noise-reducing microphones deliver precisely calibrated voice isolation during calls. Elegant and functional, the curved design of the buds further reduces wind and residual noise-pickup. For crystal-clear calls, the ONEPLUS Buds Pro 2 dominate the conversation.\nSuperior Audio Experience: Powerful, Punchy Bass – Drop the bass with 11mm dynamic drivers that bring your acoustics to life. ONEPLUS Audio ID – Hear and feel every note on your playlist with a personalized hearing profile for a precisely tailored audio experience.","rating":4.8,"price":10000.0,"offer":25.0,"type":"headphones","brand":"one plus","category":"electronics","merchantId":1248,"quantity":105,"status":"ACTIVE","thumbnailURL":"https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/619qlC03-JL._AC_SX679_.jpg","productImageURLs":["https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/41S1-O8LIZL._AC_SR38,50_.jpg","https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/41Vg0CSKmZL._AC_SR38,50_.jpg","https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/6138D3hmoiL._AC_SX679_.jpg","https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/71zYDBVeMYL._AC_SX679_.jpg"],"searchTags":["Buds Pro 2","one plus earbuds","earphone","earbuds"],"reviews":[{"reviewId":16029,"shopperId":207628,"shopperName":"vasanth Kulkarni","heading":"earbuds","description":"super","rating":5.0,"dateTime":"2025-01-21T15:20:11.48"},{"reviewId":22060,"shopperId":286068,"shopperName":"Vikas Patil","heading":"earbuds","description":"Verygood","rating":5.0,"dateTime":"2025-08-16T12:31:04.666"},{"reviewId":23641,"shopperId":315493,"shopperName":"madhu shopper","heading":"dthgkj","description":"jfryduyuiu","rating":4.0,"dateTime":"2025-11-01T11:02:11.042"},{"reviewId":27592,"shopperId":364828,"shopperName":"Dinga Dingii","heading":"good","description":"good one","rating":5.0,"dateTime":"2026-03-10T16:13:17.936"}],"createdDateTime":"2023-09-13T13:01:15.721","zoneId":"ALPHA"},{"productId":122,"name":"power bank","title":"power bank","description":"Why buy Xiaomi Mi 20000mAh 3-Port Power Bank\n\n \n\nType-C and Micro USB Charging Ports offers with perfect compatibility\n20000 mAh Battery Capacity offers efficient usage\n3 Charging Ports ensures charging of 3 devices\n \n\nWhen you get Xiaomi Mi 20000mAh 3-Port Power Bank online, you also get the awesome charging companion for your smartphones. The charger should be a 3.7V to 5V adapter or any laptop output. For a bare minimum of 20% charge the watch needs to be charged for about 30-40 mins\nYou cannot store Music in the watch, you can only control the music. 【Gaming On Wrist】- Enjoy playing games on the wrist itself as you are on the go. 【Breathe Function】- Ensure your breathing exercise is fit and healthy with the breathing function.\nThere is no volume control, however when connected to bt calling you can control the volume of the call. 【Smartphone Notifications】- Get all your mobile phone notifications on this 1.3\" Round Display Full touch smartwatch and never be late for a meeting, party or date.\nSupported Applications - Notifcations from all social media channels (Instagram, Whatsapp, Facebook), Call Notifications, Health Tracking (SpO2, Heart Rate, Sleep), Sports Tracking & many more\n【120+ Sports Modes】- Track each activity effectively with this smartwatch & activity tracker. Track your calories, steps and much more while you are on your fitness journey. This fitness tracker has it all;【In Built Mic & Speaker】- Get HD calling experience with this power-packed watch. Enhance the look of your wrist with attractive colors and sleek finish\n【Smart Health】- With the latest HRS3300 technology track your heart rate anytime of the day or even while you perform some activity. The optical sensors assure results so accurate. Monitor your blood oxygen levels to stay fit and healthy\n","rating":4.0,"price":1300.0,"offer":50.0,"type":"watch","brand":"fire-boltt Count steps, distance, and calories burned\nCharging Specs - The watch needs to be charged for 3 hours to reach 100%. The charger should be a 3.7V to 5V adapter or any laptop output. For a bare minimum of 20% charge the watch needs to be charged for about 30-40 mins\n【SPO2/ Oxygen, Heart Rate】 - Fire-Boltt Ninja 3 Plus Smartwatch comes with real time 24*7 SPO2 / Blood Oxygen tracking, Dynamic Heart Rate Monitoring (If a patient is suffering from Covid 19 please use a medical device prescribed by the Doctor)\n【IP68 Water Resistant】- This smartwatch can withstand dust, spills, raindrops and is sweatproof too\nSupported Applications - Notifcations from all social media channels (Instagram, Whatsapp, Facebook), Call Notifications, Health Tracking (SpO2, Heart Rate, Sleep), Sports Tracking & many more\n【POWERFUL BATTERY】 - About 7 days battery life and a Standby Time of 25 Days\n\n","rating":4.0,"price":8000.0,"offer":40.0,"type":"watch","brand":"fire-boltt","category":"electronics","merchantId":1248,"quantity":50,"status":"ACTIVE","thumbnailURL":"https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/61TlgEodcGL._AC_UY218_.jpg","productImageURLs":["https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/41uIEByMouL._SS40_.jpg","https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/41l79-yqLFL._SS40_.jpg","https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/51BmT7WIfIL._SS40_.jpg"],"searchTags":["boltt","fire","watch"],"reviews":[{"reviewId":19499,"shopperId":245449,"shopperName":"nemmalla sai","heading":"vaseline","description":"good product","rating":4.0,"dateTime":"2025-05-09T16:51:59.708"}],"createdDateTime":"2023-09-13T13:02:48.137","zoneId":"ALPHA"},{"productId":126,"name":"HELIO","title":" Emergency Rechargeable LED Lantern","description":"\nLight Source Type\tLED\nBrand\tPHILIPS\nColour\tGrey\nPower Source\tBattery Powered\nMaterial\tSynthetic\nAbout this item\nHigh Quality LED Light: The LED technology integrated in Helio Emergency Lantern is a uniquely developed solution by Philips. While instantly turned on, it enables an optimal light output and brings out vivid colors in your home\nThree Lighting Modes: Philips Helio Emergency lantern comes with three different lighting modes i.e., the Head light mode (can be used as torch), dim light and strong light (can be used as emergency light or as an emergency lantern)\nCharging & Backup Time: Philips Helio emergency lantern comes with overcharge and deep discharge protection. The emergency torch and lantern take up to 8 hours to completely charge. The head light(torch) comes with an 8 hours of battery backup and if used as a lantern it runs for 2.5 hours with front strong light and 8 hours with front dim light\nRechargeable Battery: The lantern comes with a high-quality rechargeable battery of 2200 mAH Lithium-Ion battery.","rating":6.0,"price":1500.0,"offer":10.0,"type":"electronic-accessories","brand":"phillips","category":"electronics","merchantId":1248,"quantity":20,"status":"ACTIVE","thumbnailURL":"https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/610ORH71n3L._SX425_.jpg","productImageURLs":["https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/610ORH71n3L._SX425_.jpg","https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/51Kz9PnVMrL._SX425_.jpg"],"searchTags":["rechargeable","phillips","LIGHT"],"reviews":[{"reviewId":2762,"shopperId":32137,"shopperName":"shilpaN","heading":"good product","description":"wowwwwwwwwwwwwwwww","rating":6.0,"dateTime":"2024-01-12T20:59:58.863"}],"createdDateTime":"2023-09-13T13:04:31.063","zoneId":"ALPHA"},{"productId":127,"name":"Triphala Juice ","title":"All-in-one Digestive Care Solution | Long term constipation, digestive problem relief supplement | Improves Gut Health | 100 % Ayurvedic Formula","description":"\nItem Form\tLiquid\nBrand\tVANSAAR\nDiet Type\tVegetarian\nMaterial Feature\tVegetarian\nRecommended Uses For Product\tHelps Weight Management & Constipation Relief\nAbout this item\nEFFECTIVE CONSTIPATION RELIEF: Vansaar Tripahala juice, a natural colon cleanser juice, enriched with Amla, Baheda & Haritaki, helps ease constipation, detox the colon, soothe the intestinal walls, and strengthen digestive health. Regular intake of this stomach cleanser juice promotes proper digestion & absorption of food thereby regulating easy bowel movements.\nRELIEVES ACIDITY, ACID REFLUX, HYPER ACIDITY: Vansaar Triphala Juice is loaded with natural Ayurvedic herbs like Amla, Harad and Baheda, a potent combination of 3 efficacious herbs that help relieve acidity, indigestion, acid reflux & hyper acidity naturally.\nMAINTAINS A HEALTHY & STRONG DIGESTIVE SYSTEM: Triphala juice from Vansaar is a natural gut cleanse juice which helps treat major digestive issues from the root naturally and improve overall digestion and gut health. Including this digestive care juice in your daily routine helps improve digestion, facilitate easy bowel wellness, and maintain a healthy & strong digestive system naturally.\nIMPROVES OVER ALL GUT HEALTH & METABOLISM: Vansaar Triphala Juice is formulated basis ayurvedic scriptures with high-quality herbs. This 100% natural solution is made with the best quality, sourced Amla, Haritaki & Baheda. Baheda helps to boost gut health naturally. 3 potent herb solution, helps strengthen overall digestive health for long term relief from all digestive issues.\nJUST POUR, MIX & DRINK IN 3 EASY STEPS- Pour 30 ml of Vansaar Triphala juice and mix with a glass of water and drink twice daily for best results.","rating":0.0,"price":500.0,"offer":10.0,"type":"boys-tshirt","brand":"vansaar","category":"beauty","merchantId":1248,"quantity":10,"status":"ACTIVE","thumbnailURL":"https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/61a9+XSOI2L._SX569_.jpg","productImageURLs":["https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/616JXjftWpL._SX569_.jpg","https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/61jddx9+GlL._SX569_.jpg","https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/61id2KCUZvL._SX569_.jpg"],"searchTags":["digetion"],"reviews":[{"reviewId":27411,"shopperId":364542,"shopperName":"vghhg adep","heading":"hhh","description":"hkhk","rating":5.0,"dateTime":"2026-03-10T15:58:21.378"}],"createdDateTime":"2023-09-13T13:04:31.064","zoneId":"ALPHA"},{"productId":128,"name":"vivo v21","title":"android","description":"\nBrand\tVivo\nModel Name\tVivo V21 (Arctic White, 8GB RAM, 128GB ROM)\nNetwork Service Provider\tUnlocked for All Carriers\nOperating System\tAndroid 11 - Stands up. Unfolds. The Galaxy Z Fold5 does a lot in one hand with its 15.73 cm(6.2-inch) Cover Screen. Unfolded, the 19.21 cm(7.6-inch) Main Screen lets you really get into the zone. Pushed-back bezels and the Under Display Camera means there's more screen and no black dot getting between you and the breathtaking Infinity Flex Display.\nDo more than more with Multi View. Whether toggling between texts or catching up on emails, take full advantage of the expansive Main Screen with Multi View. PC-like power in your pocket transforms apps optimized with One UI to give you menus and more in a glance\nNew Taskbar for PC-like multitasking. Wipe out tasks in fewer taps. Add apps to the Taskbar for quick navigation and bouncing between windows when you're in the groove. And with App Pair, one tap launches up to three apps, all sharing one super-productive screen\nOur toughest Samsung Galaxy foldables ever. From the inside out, Galaxy Z Fold5 is made with materials that are not only stunning, but stand up to life's bumps and fumbles. The front and rear panels, made with exclusive Corning Gorilla Glass Victus2, are ready to resist sneaky scrapes and scratches. With our toughest aluminum frame made with Armor Aluminum, this is one durable smartphone.\nWorld’s first water resistant foldable smartphones. Be adventurous, rain or shine. You don't have to sweat the forecast when you've got one of the world's first water-resistant foldable Airdopes 131","title":"boat airdopes","description":"With Mic:Yes\nBluetooth version: 5.0 / 5.1\nWireless range: 10 m\nCharging time: 2 Hours\nPlayback Time: Upto 15 to 60 Hours Playback\nASAP Charge: 5 Mins Charge= 90 Mins Playback\n13MM Drivers\n7.IPX4: Sweat Resistance\n\nAre you looking for a wireless earbud-type headset that delivers an impressive playback time? If your answer is yes, bring home the boAt Airdopes 131 that comes with a carrying case. This carrying case also acts as a 650 mAh portable charger that extends the playback time of these earbuds by up to 15 hours, i.e. 4 times its normal charging capacity. The normal battery capacity of each of these earbuds is 40 mAh and this delivers up to 3 hours of playback time. These earbuds feature Bluetooth v5.0 technology that delivers a stable connection that lets your rock on without connectivity issues. The stereo calling feature of these earbuds allows you to enjoy calls via its built-in microphone and 13-mm drivers. These earbuds are powered up by the IWP Technology featured in them the moment you open the case. The presence of a Type-C charging port ensures you can easily charge it with any charger that has a compatible White","description":"Style\tModern\nBrand\tWooum\nColour\tWhite\nProduct Dimensions\t29D x 10W x 3H Centimeters\nSpecial Feature\tEnergy Efficient, Flexible, Lightweight, Portable, Rechargeable, Dimmable, Touch Control, USB Port,\nLight Source Type\tLED\nFinish Type\tPolished\nMaterial\tPlastic\nLamp Type\tÂ Desk Lamp, Table Lamp\nRoom Type\tBedroom, Study Room\nAbout this item\nPRODUCT DETAILS: USB port for convenient device charging with 1.2 meters USB Cable. with 5V micro USB charging cord, which also can be charged by computer, laptop and power bank. With mobile phone stand to hold the mobile phone. The Phone Stand, frees your hands and being practical for you to watch videos for long hours. Use silicon tube to adjust the lighting angle. This Table Lamp is Operated with Touch and can be easily adjusted with it Flexible Body features.\nPORTABLE DESIGN: The small and portable design, which means you, can fold easily to carry it wherever you go. Soft and high quality goosenecks hose of with flexible 360 degree can be bending at your will.\nCHARGING INDICATOR: WOOUM Table Lamp comes with charging indicator but there are no indicator available which shows full battery charge or level of battery charged. Connect the USB power cord to the USB adapter for charging. It is being charged as the red indication light on. Charge fully at least once every 3 months if it is not in use. Lightweight and compact size convenient to carry and for your travel. Backup time - 120 minutes.\nNOTE: PLEASE DO NOT USE WHILE CHARGING, PLEASE DO NOT TURN ON WHILE CHARGING. Packing contents: 1 X Light; 1 x USB charging line. Switch Type: Touch Light , Brightness : Touch Dimming , Light Source: LED Bulbs.\nENERGY AND RECHARGEABLE: This Rechargeable WOOUM Table Lamp has a twin AC-DC Function. You can charge It fully in 3 to 4 hours and then can use it on the DC mode when there is a power failure. You can operate by AC power directly when there is electricity through adapter. Low consumption and long lifespan. Besides, it is a good choice for your family as emergency lighting when there is a sudden power outage.\nUSAGE: Furnish and light up your desk with this luxurious WOOUM Rechargeable LED Desk lamp. The table lamp comes with high bright LED lights. You can easily control the intensity of the light with dimming features. Bright LED light source, 3 adjustable levels, no radiation, no ultraviolet, no flicker, eye-friendly and energy efficient.\nLIGHTING HOURS:- Lights resists heating up and lasts for 120 Minutes if used under strongest light setting and 2-3 hours if used under weak light setting. Surface light source is more protective of the EYES. Operating off of easy-to-use, touch-sensitive control, this LED desk lamp is perfect for quick, versatile lighting.
