Launched UltraCharge 20,000mAh QCPD Power Bank,USB C/B Input,Tripple output 22.5W High-Speed Power Delivery,Compatible to iPhone 14 13 12 11 Samsung S22 S23 S21 Google Pixel7 Oneplus Brand: FLiX","description":"\nConnector Type\tDual USB Type A (Output port), Micro USB Type B (Output port), USB Type C (Input and Output port)\nBrand\tFLiX\nBattery Capacity\t20000 Milliamp Hours\nColour\tBlack\nSpecial Feature\tBIS Certified, Auto Shut-Off, LED Indicator Lights, QC+PD Super Fast charging Support\nAbout this item\n✅ [Lightning-Fast Charging] With a powerful 22.5W Quick Charge Power Delivery output, our power bank ensures lightning-fast charging for your devices. Say goodbye to long waiting times and enjoy swift power backup that keeps up with your fast-paced lifestyle. LED indicators provide clear status updates on the power bank's charge level.\n✅ [High-Capacity Battery] The 20,000mAh capacity provides ample power to keep your devices charged throughout the day. It offers multiple recharges for your smartphone iPhone Pro Max 3 charges, iPhone 13 4.4 charges, Samsung S23 3.4 charges, Google pixel 6 2.8 charges, ipad Mini 3 charges or other USB-powered devices, ensuring you stay connected whenever and wherever you need it\n✅ [Triple Output and Dual Input] With two USB Type-A ports and one Type-C port, our power bank allows you to charge up to three devices simultaneously. Whether you need to power up your smartphone, tablet, Bluetooth earphones, or other USB-enabled devices, our power bank has got you covered. You can choose to recharge the power bank using either the Micro USB (Type B) or Type-C input. This flexibility ensures compatibility with various charging cables and devices, making it hassle-free to recharge the power bank itself\n✅ [Safety] Experience the safest charging with our FLiX Powerbanks, we use only the highest-grade materials with all the safety regulations like current identification, over-current, electrostatic, overload protection, and temperature control, so we do have the confidence to provide an industry-leading 400 days warranty\n✅ [Compact and Durable] With its compact size and sleek profile, our power bank effortlessly fits into your pocket, bag, or purse. It takes up minimal space, making it ideal for travel, commuting, or any on-the-go adventures, Built to last, our power bank is crafted using high-quality materials that ensure durability and longevity. It can handle the rigors of daily use, including accidental drops or impacts, without compromising its performance\n✅ [Compatibility] This is a universal Powerbank which can charger all the devices like mobile phones, Tablets, Headphones / Neckbands, Smartwatches and many more, supports all new models Smartphones like iPhone 14, iPhone 13, iPhone 12, iPhone 11, Samsung Galaxy S23 Samsung Galaxy S22, Samsung Galaxy S21, Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 3/4, Samsung Galaxy Z Fold 4, Google Pixel 7, Google Pixel 6, Oneplus 11, Oneplus 10, Vivo V21, Vivo V25, Redmi Note 12, Realme 11 Pro and many more","rating":5.0,"price":4999.0,"offer":56.0,"type":"power-bank","brand":"flix(beetel)","category":"electronics","merchantId":28810,"quantity":150,"status":"ACTIVE","thumbnailURL":"https://images-eu.ssl-images-amazon.com/images/I/41bgyhEVLmL._AC_UL232_SR232,232_.jpg","productImageURLs":["https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/71yHGCI55vL._SL1200_.jpg","https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/612cXst7lmL._SL1200_.jpg","https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/518QApLFFxL._SL1200_.jpg","https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/41bgyhEVLmL._SL1000_.jpg"],"searchTags":["charging","FLiX(Beetel)","flix","20000mah","power bank"],"reviews":[{"reviewId":18404,"shopperId":236027,"shopperName":"customer shopping","heading":"power bank","description":"super and beautifull on time ","rating":5.0,"dateTime":"2025-04-09T10:44:46.175"}],"createdDateTime":"2023-12-28T10:54:40.989","zoneId":"ALPHA"},{"productId":2648,"name":"Scott International Men's Quilted Puffer Jacket","title":"Scott International Men's Quilted Puffer Jacket - Lightweight, Water Repellant, Elastic Cuffs, Zipped Pockets, Casual Winter Jacket - Stylish Outerwear for Men","description":"Product details\nMaterial composition100% Nylon\nStylePuffer Jacket\nFit typeRegular\nLengthStandard Length\nPatternSolid\nCare instructionsMachine Wash\nCountry of OriginIndia\nAbout this item\nLightweight Warmth, Premium Zippers, and Water Repellency: Embrace the cold with confidence in our Men's Quilted Puffer Jacket. Crafted with lightweight materials, it offers cozy warmth without the bulk. The best-quality YKK zippers ensure durability and ease of use, while the puffer horizontal quilting enhances insulation. Plus, it's water-repellent to keep you dry in drizzles.\nSmart Zippered Pockets: Stay organized and keep your essentials secure with multiple zippered pockets. Whether you're stashing your keys, wallet, or phone, you'll have easy access to your items while on the move.\nComfort in Every Stitch: Our puffer jacket features soft elastic sleeve cuffs, providing a snug fit that keeps cold air out. Enjoy unrestricted movement and unbeatable comfort throughout your day.\nVersatile Style: Elevate your winter wardrobe with this stylish and functional puffer jacket. It's perfect for both casual outings and outdoor adventures, allowing you to stay warm while looking effortlessly cool.\nExceptional Quality: Scott International is committed to providing top-notch quality. This quilted puffer jacket is no exception. It's designed to withstand the elements, so you can enjoy long-lasting comfort and style.\nAdditional Information\nManufacturerSwitz Inc, Bengaluru, Switz Inc, Bengaluru\nPackerSwitz Inc, Name\t15s-fq3071TU\nScreen Size\t39.6 Centimetres\nColour\tSilver\nHard Disk Size\t512 GB\nCPU Model\tCeleron\nRAM Memory Installed Size\t8 GB\nOperating System\tWindows 11 Home\nSpecial Feature\tBrightview, HD, Micro-Edge Display, Numeric Keypad\nGraphics Card Description\tIntegrated\nSee more\nAbout this item\n【2-core Intel Celeron N4500】2 threads and 4MB L3 cache deliver fast processing speeds. The Intel UHD graphics help you dive into crisp, stunning visuals.\n【Upgraded memory and storage】8GB DDR4 RAM and 512GB PCIe NVMe M.2 SSD allow you to undertake improved multitasking with high-bandwidth memory and ample storage. Now, browse or work as you please.\n【Micro-edge display】The 15.6-inch, HD, 250-nit, and micro-edge display immerses you in your projects, helping you explore intricate details on a large screen.\n【Effortless connectivity】Wi-Fi 5 (2x2) and Bluetooth 5.0 make you unstoppable with a dependable connection. Stay plugged in with 1 x USB Type-C, 2 x USB Type-A, and 1 x HDMI 1.4b ports.\n【Long battery life】With HP Fast Charge, power up your device up to 50% in 45 mins. Once done, get ready to go where work takes you backed up with a long-lasting 41Wh battery life.\n【Business conferencing】HP True Vision 720p HD camera with integrated dual array mics and dual speakers enables you to put your point across with utmost clarity in high resolution.\n【Why HP】Experience the unparalleled advantages of choosing HP, the most preferred and trusted PC brand by Indians, which empowers you with cutting-edge technology and steadfast dependability.\n【Pre-loaded Win 11 and MS Office】Comes with Win 11 and MS Office 2021. To activate your MS Office, sign in or sign up, and follow the Office Activation Wizard.\n【Sustainably made】Make an environmentally conscious choice with a thoughtfully designed laptop that contains recycled plastics and is EPEAT Silver registered and ENERGY STAR certified.\n【Reliable design】A sleek yet sturdy laptop that delivers rock-solid performance all day long with power-packed features, optimized heat management, and 1-year on-site standard warranty.\n","rating":0.0,"price":29190.0,"offer":14.0,"type":"","brand":"hp laptop 15s, intel celeron, 15.6-inch (39.6 cm), hd, 8gb ddr4, 512gb ","Voltage Regulator","regulator","spare "],"reviews":[],"createdDateTime":null,"zoneId":"ALPHA"},{"productId":3059,"name":"Mobile","title":"Samsung s22 ultra","description":"he Samsung Galaxy S22 Ultra is the headliner of the S22 series. It's the first S series phone to include Samsung's S Pen. Specifications are top-notch including 6.8-inch Dynamic AMOLED display with 120Hz refresh rate, Snapdragon 8 Gen 1 processor, 5000mAh battery, up to 12gigs of RAM, and 1TB of storage. In the camera department, a quad-camera setup is presented with two telephoto sensors.","rating":0.0,"price":125000.0,"offer":59.0,"type":"mobile","brand":"samsung PERSONALISED WATER BOTTLE - WARM PEACH","title":"Bottle","description":"This vacuum-insulated drink bottle has a luxurious, satin finish and a strong, double-walled stainless steel design allowing you to take your hydration partner with you wherever you go. Our bottle is shatterproof, condensation-free, and has a sturdy screw-top lid, making it more than just a pretty accessory. Make it perfect by personalising your accessory to keep you hydrated everywhere\n\n- Made from 18/8 Stainless Steel.\n- Capacity: 500ml & 750ml\n- Dimensions: For 500ml- 7cm (diameter) by 22.3cm (height),\nFor 750ml- 7cm (diameter) by 26cm (height)\n- 100% BPA Free and non toxic\n- Keeps your drink cold for up to 15 hours\n- Keeps your drink hot for up to 12 hours\n- Leakproof","rating":0.0,"price":1500.0,"offer":50.0,"type":"electronic-accessories","brand":"quench","category":"electronics","merchantId":83107,"quantity":100,"status":"ACTIVE","thumbnailURL":"https://www.themessycorner.in/cdn/shop/products/P3_76b0e82b-af75-461f-8ae7-d573fda61a70_60x.jpg?v=1674460041","productImageURLs":["https://www.themessycorner.in/cdn/shop/products/P2_700x.jpg?v=1674460041","https://www.themessycorner.in/cdn/shop/products/P3_76b0e82b-af75-461f-8ae7-d573fda61a70_60x.jpg?v=1674460041","https://www.themessycorner.in/cdn/shop/products/P4_700x.jpg?v=1674215518"],"searchTags":["peach bottle","branded","bottle"],"reviews":[],"createdDateTime":"2024-06-04T22:18:34.152","zoneId":"ALPHA"},{"productId":4019,"name":"FEW ITEMS LEFT ASYMMETRIC VOLUMINOUS DRESS","title":"dress","description":"Short dress with a straight neckline and exposed shoulders. iphone 13","IPHONE 13","Iphone 13","iphone 13"],"reviews":[],"createdDateTime":"2024-08-07T11:38:15.089","zoneId":"ALPHA"},{"productId":5413,"name":"Mobile","title":"Samsung Galaxy S23 Ultra 5G AI Smartphone (Green, 12GB, 256GB Storage)","description":"More innovation, less footprint – Galaxy S23 Ultra's striking symmetrical design returns with one major difference: recycled and eco-conscious materials. From the metal frame to the glass finish, it's polished with fresh new colors inspired by nature.\nNote's signature tool comes built in - The built-in S Pen keeps the legacy of Note alive. Plus, it helps you ditch the dependency on notebooks, making sketches and jotting notes effortless and eco-friendly.\nLow light. Camera. Action - A Pro-grade Camera grabs brighter photos and video, dusk to dawn. The intelligent pixel sensor adapts to low light with Nightography and the camera lens tones down flare for clearer captures\n200MP. Wow-worthy resolution - Resolution on the Wide-angle Camera has nearly doubled, delivering strikingly clear photos. Zoom and crop your shots for a whole new view —or leave it intact for brilliant detail, corner to corner.\nPower for those who don't pause - Your quest for epic mobile gaming is over. Snapdragon 8 Gen 2 Mobile Platform for Galaxy optimizes and streamlines your device for silky smooth games —without draining the battery","rating":0.0,"price":149999.0,"offer":43.0,"type":"","brand":"samsung","category":"electronics","merchantId":108346,"quantity":100,"status":"ACTIVE","thumbnailURL":"https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/71lD7eGdW-L._SL1500_.jpg","productImageURLs":["https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/61k2ydckuLL._SL1500_.jpg","https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/71g0eynUajL._SL1500_.jpg","https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/61WZtv4Xy-L._SL1500_.jpg"],"searchTags":["23 ultra","samsung galaxy 23 ultra"],"reviews":[],"createdDateTime":"2024-08-07T11:43:34.881","zoneId":"ALPHA"},{"productId":5417,"name":"laptop","title":"Apple 2024 MacBook Air 15″ Laptop with M3 chip: 38.91 cm (15.3″) Liquid Retina Display, 8GB Unified Memory, 256GB SSD Storage, Backlit Keyboard, 1080p FaceTime HD Camera, Touch ID- Midnight","description":"Supercharged by M3 — The blazing-fast MacBook Air with the M3 chip is a super-portable laptop that sails through work and play.\nPORTABLE DESIGN — Lightweight and just over 1 cm thin, so you can take MacBook Air anywhere you go.\nGET MORE DONE FASTER — The powerful 8-core CPU and 10-core GPU of the Apple M3 chip keep things running smoothly.\nUP TO 18 HOURS OF BATTERY LIFE — Amazing, all-day battery life so you can leave the power adapter at home.\nMORE ROOM FOR WHAT YOU LOVE — The 38.91 cm (15.3″) Liquid Retina display supports 1 billion colours.\nLOOK SHARP, SOUND GREAT — Everything looks and sounds amazing with a 1080p FaceTime HD camera, three mics and six speakers with Spatial Audio.\nAPPS FLY WITH APPLE SILICON — All your favourites, from Microsoft 365 to Adobe Creative Cloud, run lightning fast in macOS.","rating":0.0,"price":134900.0,"offer":9.0,"type":"","brand":"apple","category":"electronics","merchantId":108346,"quantity":34,"status":"ACTIVE","thumbnailURL":"https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/71O14N5GYLL._SL1500_.jpg","productImageURLs":["https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/71O14N5GYLL._SL1500_.jpg","https://m.media-amazon.com/images/I/61BSo-tUthL._SL1500_.jpg"],"searchTags":["mac Covered in Warranty\nParts & Labour will be Covered Under Warranty Against Any Defect Arising Out of Faulty or Defective Material or Workmanship.\nWarranty Service Type\nFor any warranty related issues, please call the Customer Support - [1800 40 7267864][https://www.samsung.com/in/microsite/samsung-mall/contact-us/]\nInstallation & Demo\nInstallation & Demo Details\nWe'll facilitate the installation and demo through authorized service engineer at your convenience The installation will be done within 48 hours of delivery of the TV.The service engineer will install your new TV, either on wall mount or on table top. Immerse yourself in the captivating world of the 51.05mm (2.01 inch) large display, and a brilliant resolution of 240*296 pixels. Every detail comes to life with exceptional clarity and vibrancy with 320 NITS Peak Brightness\nMetal Body Design - Fire-Boltt Ninja Call Pro Max comes with a sleek and stunning metal body design. Unleash the power of longevity with impressive battery life. With up to 7 days of continuous usage and an astounding 15 days of standby time, this remarkable timepiece keeps up with your active lifestyle without missing a beat.\nBluetooth calling - Stay connected wherever you go with Bluetooth calling. Seamlessly make and receive calls directly from your wrist, without the need to reach for your phone.This men and women fashion smartwatch ensures crystal-clear audio quality, allowing you to have conversations with ease. The watch needs to be charged for 2 hours to reach 100%. The charger should be a 3.7V to 5V adapter or any laptop output\nCamera control and music control - Effortlessly snap photos and record videos right from your wrist. Adjust camera settings, frame your shots, and capture the perfect angle. Enjoy seamless control over your favorite tracks, playlists, and music apps with the music control feature. Music Cannot Be stored in the watch, Volume cannot be controlled\n120+ sports modes - Unlock your athletic potential with the smartwatch's extensive range of 120+ sports modes. From running and cycling to swimming and yoga, it offers specialized tracking and insights for a wide variety of sports and activities.","rating":0.0,"price":2500.0,"offer":3.0,"type":"watch","brand":"fire-boltt","category":"electronics","merchantId":258478,"quantity":10,"status":"ACTIVE","thumbnailURL":"data:image/jpeg;base64,/9j/4AAQSkZJRgABAQAAAQABAAD/2wCEAAkGBw8PEBUQEBAVFRUVFRUVFxUXFRgWFxUVFRYWFhcVFxUaHSggGholHBUYITEhJikrLi4uGCAzODM4NygtLysBCgoKDg0OGBAQGi0lHSUrLS0tLS0tLS0tLS0tLy0tLSstLS0tLS8tLSstLS0tLS0vKy0tLS0tLS0tKystNTUtNf/AABEIAOEA4QMBIgACEQEDEQH/xAAcAAABBAMBAAAAAAAAAAAAAAADAQIFBgAEBwj/xABFEAACAQMCAwUFBAgEBAYDAAABAgMABBESIQUxQQYTIlFhBzJxgZEUQqGxIzNSYnKCwfAWktHxQ6LC4SQ0Y3OTlBVTVP/EABgBAQEBAQEAAAAAAAAAAAAAAAABAgME/8QAIhEBAQEBAAMAAgEFAAAAAAAAAAERAgMhMRJBEyIycZHw/9oADAMBAAIRAxEAPwCepRWAU6gQClxSgUoFBgFKBS4pQKBMUuKUCnYoG4pcUuKg+P8AGJbSJ5mjBCgYUNkuzFVVc6dslsbZrHfc5muvi8N8m5ZM9+7/ANf9JvFLiq5c9obqGEyyWke7IkYS5D95I7qmjITbYk9fdxWrL2xlCvKtqjRLK0Sn7QBLKBJ3eqOIp4snOBnoa25LbisxVZHaW6llljtbJZVikePUblI2YpgMQjLnGTjPKpWbiiG5FqrqCulpSWA06v1cQ399zvj9kHzFBI4pMVUZe2sgTvltUaIymNMXA72Ud4YwyQ6N8kHbPQ77VKf/AJud7iSOG01wwv3ck5mVcMqh3CxkZYjIHMbnoN6CZxWYqC4T2l+0yW8awlTNA9wwL7xoG0LsB4tR5ctvpTOJ8cvYpxClij6y3dFrqONpQgBYqhBIxnl5UE9ikxVf4lx29h7vNgn6TQviu41/TOCe6G3iO3Pr0qY4bLNJGGnhEL5OUEgkwAdjqAxvzoD4pCKIRTSKAZFJTyKQigYRTaeaQigYaSnUlA2lrKWgMKUCsFOAoMApQKUCnAUCAU4CsApwFAgFOApQKcBQNAqK4/whrvuF1ARxzpLIDnLiPJCfAkjOfKpgCnYoK5xfs7r7hLcRRRwyPNo06R3oRhEQFGMB2ya1OF9j/sz2skfdM0MLRSa1JyxJcSRnHgYOzb9VbFW/FLpoKf2V7N3Vo6GU2rgd5qlEb/aDrLP+sO2NTcscq3IuAL3st0kcaylXWHIIALA6ppCviLueZznSANiTVk01mmgocXYqZjAsotI44HRgYI5O+IRiwj7yRidJJJNbjcB4ilu1tFPBiUzmWVlfvCZ3YkoFOAQp5knf4VcNNJpoKcOz99BcvLayWwQxRQosiSMUjiUAAaSOZyT8q37XhFw11HdXMkbGOBowqKwHeO+WcauQ0ALzqw4pCtBC8V4U89xbSalEcDvIynOWcrpjI6DSSTUmRRSKQigCRTSKMRTCKAZFNIohFNIoBkU0iiEU0igYaaaeabQJWUuKSg2AKcBSCnAUCgU4CsApwFBgFOApQKcBQRn291lk1qO6R1TUM5QlEbU/7uXxkcsDO24d9vfuFkwuTMI+RxpM/dZ589P41IrCoz4R4t22944A389gB8qxLSMKECKFBBC6RgEHUCByznf40GldXkiTaQgZFjV3AB14ZnXK9DjTyxk748ifh913pkwVKq4CleqmNHznruxrcES6tWBqwBnG+ASQM+WSfrSRcPiKugjQK2pnXSMMcblh1Jx1oNZ52FwsWBho3c+eVZAOvLxGoqXi0wjkkBUBDLhfs8zAiNmG8obSM6e 22.5W Fast Charging | Dual Output & Input | Charge 3 Devices Simultaneously | for Smartphones, TWS Earbuds, Speakers, Tablets (Black)","description":"Style Name: Black\nConnector Type\tMicro USB\nBrand\tamazon basics\nBattery Capacity\t20000 Milliamp Hours\nColour\tBlack - 20000 mAh\nSpecial Feature\tFast Charging\nAbout this item\nHigh Capacity: 20000 mAh capacity allows you to charge a 4000 mAh device up to 3.5 times.\nFast Charging: Supports 22.5W output for quick charging of smartphones, TWS earbuds, speakers, and tablet PCs.\nDual Output Ports: Equipped with USB-A and Type-C ports for versatile charging options.\nDual Input Ports: Features both Micro USB and Type-C input ports for flexible recharging options.\nSimultaneous Charging: Can charge up to three devices at the same time with 2 USB ports and 1 Type-C port.\nBidirectional Fast Charging: Supports bidirectional Type-C power delivery fast charging and quick charge technology for efficient power been crafted to bring the Dolby Audio experience to your TWS earbuds. With Immersio it feels like \"Cinema in your ears\". Crafted with love for OTT lovers, step into a whole new level of binge-watching with Dolby's signature sound where action is brought to life by elevating sound for a cinematic viewing experience. The audio expectation with powerfully engineered flagship TWS is to offer a perfect balance of Power and Clarity in your ears. These Bluetooth headsets have Quad-mic AI ENC for environmental noise reduction. paint","Nail Paint"],"reviews":null,"createdDateTime":"2025-07-31T18:25:22.68","zoneId":"ALPHA"},{"productId":13255,"name":"HeadPhones","title":"HeadSet","description":"Noise headsets are wireless audio devices designed by the Indian electronics brand Noise. Known for their stylish design and affordability, these headsets offer features like Bluetooth connectivity, passive noise isolation, long battery life, and touch controls. Popular among young users, Noise headsets are commonly used for music, calls, and gaming, and are often praised for delivering decent sound quality at a budget-friendly ml","title":"Rice Face Wash With Rice Water & Niacinamide for Glass Skin - 150 ml","description":"Want to achieve glass skin but don’t know where to start? We’ve got you! Introducing Mamaearth Rice Water Face Wash that deeply cleanses the grime & grease, leaving your skin dewy and refreshed. Enriched with the goodness of Rice Water, the face wash is rich in antioxidants that help reduce blemishes and dark spots. Unlike other face washes, its creamy texture doesn’t strip your skin’s essential moisture after cleansing. Instead, it adds a boost of hydration to your skin and locks it in! The goodness of Niacinamide in our Rice Face Wash reduces the appearance of acne marks and brightens your skin tone to give you that glass-like radiant skin that you’ve been wishing for! Shampoo with Rosemary & Methi Dana for Reducing Hair Loss & Breakage - 250 ml","title":"Rosemary Anti-Hair Fall Shampoo with Rosemary & Methi Dana for Reducing Hair Loss & Breakage - 250 ml","description":"Struggling with excessive hair loss? Mamaearth Rosemary Anti-Hair Fall Shampoo to the rescue! Crafted with the natural goodness of Rosemary, a super potent herb that’s proven to stimulate hair growth. The shampoo is also infused with Methi Dana - a time-tested ingredient that helps control hair fall.\nTogether, this power-packed duo packs quite a punch. In turn, the Rosemary Anti-Hair Fall Shampoo gives you up to 94% stronger hair* and results in up to 93% less hair fall. Rosemary strengthens weakened hair follicles and promotes hair growth while Methi Dana is extremely effective in controlling hair fall. It also strengthens the hair follicles and curbs hair shedding. The Rosemary Anti-Hair Fall Shampoo gently cleanses your scalp and hair while fortifying your locks with its nutrient-rich formulation.\nThat’s not all, Rosemary Anti-Hair Fall Shampoo is also Made Safe Certified, which means it contains no toxins or harmful chemicals and is enriched with nature’s finest ingredients ","rating":0.0,"price":349.0,"offer":50.0,"type":"cream","brand":"mamaearth","category":"beauty","merchantId":284643,"quantity":600,"status":"ACTIVE","thumbnailURL":"https://images.mamaearth.in/catalog/product/3/_/3_11.jpg?format=auto&height=600","productImageURLs":["https://images.mamaearth.in/catalog/product/4/_/4_5_.jpg?format=auto&height=600","https://images.mamaearth.in/catalog/product/1/_/1_7_white_bg.jpg?format=auto&height=600"],"searchTags":["Rosemary"],"reviews":null,"createdDateTime":null,"zoneId":"ALPHA"},{"productId":13725,"name":"Creamy Matte Long Stay Lipstick with Murumuru Butter ","title":"Creamy Matte Long Stay Lipstick with Murumuru Butter and Vitamin E - 4.2g | Cranberry Crush","description":"Get ready to pout out loud. for Hair | Hair straightener for woman with 73mm Large Paddle Design | Electric Comb for Women | Gifts for woman | PTC Fast Heat-Up (30s) | 2 Heat Settings (180°C & 210°C) | Auto Shut-Off & 360° Swivel Cord","description":"About this item\nLarge Paddle Brush (73 mm) – Covers More Hair for Faster Styling The hair straightening brush is designed with a wide paddle (73 mm) to style more strands in one pass, cutting down on styling time while ensuring smooth and sleek results.\nTriple Bristle Design with Ceramic Coating – Safe & Even Heat Distribution This straightener brush features ceramic-coated triple bristles, ensuring even heat distribution while minimizing hair damage and preventing burns, making styling safer and more effective.\nPTC Fast Heat-Up – Ready to Use in Just 30 Seconds – With PTC heating technology, this hair straightening comb heats up in just 30 seconds, so you can start styling instantly without waiting, perfect for last-minute touch-ups.\nTwo Temperature Settings – Adjustable for All Hair Types – Choose between 180°C for thin/medium hair and 210°C for thick hair with this straightening brush, ensuring customized styling based on your hair texture for
